skills.definition: The caster projects a jagged pulse of black-white static at a foe, attempting to rip active magic apart. The energy arcs like cracking glass, snapping through ongoing protections or buffs. If the casting pushes against an unfamiliar weave, the strain can bite back.

skills.name: Unweave Glyph
skills.definition: The caster kneels and presses a hand over a rune or ward, pulling loose the threads of its power without triggering it. Lines fade like smoke in a draft as sigils collapse into inert marks. The work takes a focused moment, ideal for traps and seals.

skills.name: Arcane Lockdown
skills.definition: The caster slams their hand into the air, and a shimmering lattice of black-silver sigils cages the battlefield. Within this dome, all ongoing magical effects strain as if under pressure; wards sputter, summoned creatures flicker, and enchantments lose their grip. The effect is localized, forcing spellcasters to contend with a hostile zone of unraveling magic.

skills.name: Mirror of Reversal
skills.definition: With a cutting gesture, the caster conjures a polished obsidian mirror of crackling light. The next spell cast against them or an ally is caught, refracted, and hurled back at its originator. The mirror flashes once before shattering, its shards dissolving into motes of light.

skills.name: Seal of Silence
skills.definition: The caster inscribes a glowing seal mid-air; once complete, it detonates in a hush that devours all sound and snuffs magical chants. Casters inside the radius find their words vanish, gestures falter, and spellwork collapses into stillness. The silence is oppressive, broken only when the seal fades.

skills.name: Annihilation Field
skills.definition: With a thunderous gesture, the caster tears open a roiling sphere of black static and jagged white arcs. Within its boundaries, all spells unravel—wards collapse, enchantments dissolve, conjured creatures falter, and protective barriers shred. The zone devours both ally and enemy magic, leaving raw silence where no spell can persist. The air hums like shattered glass vibrating in place, reality itself groaning under the negation.

skills.name: Reflective Maelstrom
skills.definition: The caster spreads both arms, spinning an immense whirl of mirrored shards and black light around themselves. For a short time, hostile spells that strike the maelstrom are caught, refracted, and flung outward in chaotic arcs. Some rebound on their originators, others scatter to random foes, tearing apart order itself. The storm roars with a thousand voices of half-cast spells, until it finally shatters in a cascade of broken energy.

skills.name: Oblivion Veil
skills.definition: The caster raises both arms and reality itself shudders. Black fractures crack open in the air, bleeding silence that swallows sound, color, and light. Within this vast shroud, all magic is unmade: wards collapse like sandcastles, enchantments are shredded to threads, conjured beings vanish screaming into void, and even ongoing spells of Grand Master tier falter beneath the unraveling weight. The Veil is not mere dispelling—it is *denial of the arcane’s existence*. The shroud spreads outward in a rolling wave of static silence, extinguishing magic wherever it passes. Both allies and enemies are stripped of their arcane power, left bare to steel and will alone. The air tastes of ash and stillness. When the Veil ends, the world does not immediately recover—magic takes minutes, even hours, to return to balance in the area. The spell is legendary, feared, and whispered of as a weapon that can unmake entire battlefields, kingdoms, or worlds if sustained.

skills.name: Soul
skills.definition: Soul magic interacts with the inner essence of living beings. It can strengthen willpower, reveal karmic echoes, or reach into the deepest layers of identity. This is a sacred magic—personal, powerful, and deeply felt.

skills.name: Soul’s Whisper
skills.definition: The caster places a hand upon a creature or object and opens their inner senses. At its most basic, faint echoes of the soul can be felt—warmth, presence, and vitality—hinting at the unseen patterns that bind life to spirit.

skills.name: Ancestral Aegis
skills.definition: A faint halo of motes gathers at the caster’s brow, like dust caught in lamplight, then sinks into the skin with a comforting warmth. A whisper of remembered voices—ancestors, mentors, guardians—threads through the caster’s thoughts and steadies the breath. The world’s clamor softens; edges of panic round off; doubts lose their bite. On the battlefield this presents as poise under pressure: hands stop shaking, the heart stops racing, and grim determination replaces fear. The effect does not force bravery; it clarifies the will so it can choose. Subtle ripples in the soul make it harder for wandering spirits to probe or tag the caster with a quick reading. Tactically, it’s best triggered just before a charge, when enemy fright tricks or possession attempts are expected. It synergizes well with teams that rely on resolve under fire, buying a brief window to act cleanly. Old wardens taught it as a first defense: know yourself, then the enemy. The glow is barely visible unless one looks from the corner of an eye—and then it’s gone.

skills.name: Lifethread Gift
skills.definition: A silver thread of light unwinds from the caster’s chest to their palm, pulsing with each heartbeat. On touch the filament leaps into the ally like a spark to tinder, and warmth floods bruised flesh and flagging spirit. The caster feels a brief tug—as if missing a step on a stair—then steadies as the transfer finishes. Wounds do not knit theatrically; they simply stop worsening, and color returns to the cheeks. In the scrum this is a swift triage, shoring up a friend who must not fall before the next exchange. Veterans learn to slide a hand along a forearm in passing, gifting strength without breaking stride. The rite is taboo for theft: it cannot rip life from the unwilling, only give freely. It is most efficient when the team rotates guard over the healer, letting quick touches keep the line intact. Soul schools teach it on day one with a simple rule—“Spend what you can stand.” The thread fades like breath on glass the moment the gift is given.

skills.name: Echo of Emotion
skills.definition: A pale shimmer flits across the caster’s eyes as their perception slips beyond the physical. Every heartbeat in the area becomes a drum, every surge of feeling a ripple against the skin. The caster perceives not thoughts, but emotional signatures—fear tightening like a fist, anger sparking like static, calm flowing like water. On the battlefield this allows instant reading of morale, revealing who is faltering, who is about to lash out, or where hidden malice waits. Outside of combat it can be used to gauge truthfulness or the general atmosphere of a crowd. The effect is not invasive—it is more like hearing the tone of a voice without knowing the words. Mystics describe it as “colors of the heart” bleeding briefly into sight. The air smells faintly of incense when cast, though no smoke burns.

skills.name: Soul Bind
skills.definition: Threads of pale silver light snake from the caster’s hand and lash around the target like ribbons caught in wind. The strands sink beneath the skin with a chill, anchoring the soul to its vessel and denying easy escape. The victim feels a sudden weight, as though an unseen hand is pressing them into place. Their movements drag, will feels tethered, and a sense of exposure creeps in as though the caster’s gaze reaches deeper than flesh. On the battlefield this halts quick retreats, prevents teleportation, or simply slows a foe long enough for allies to strike. The effect is not cruel by design—it was originally taught to prevent wayward spirits from fleeing before rites could be completed. To onlookers, the target appears wrapped in faint glowing threads that fade after a moment.

skills.name: Warden’s Lantern
skills.definition: The caster raises a hand and conjures a ghostly lantern, its flame a cold white glow that reveals far more than light should. Shadows recoil unnaturally; hidden spirits are dragged into pale outline; invisible bindings are traced like spiderwebs in frost. Within the glow, allies feel safer, as if a quiet guardian watches over them. The lantern hovers just above the caster’s shoulder, moving as they move, and hums faintly with the sound of distant bells. On the battlefield it denies concealment tricks, unmasking cloaked foes or spirit-born threats. In social or investigative play it unmasks disguises of the soul, though not mundane masks. The glow fades after the round, leaving only a faint chill.

skills.name: Astral Chains
skills.definition: Spectral chains burst from the caster’s hands, lashing out with an echoing rattle that vibrates in the bones. The chains are not physical—they bind the essence of a foe. When struck, the target feels the weight of entire lifetimes pressing down, dragging them into stillness. Ethereal shackles clamp around limbs and soul alike, glowing faintly with runic script. Onlookers see the victim slow as if time itself is reluctant to carry them forward. The battlefield shifts: one dangerous opponent is suddenly anchored, slowed, and exposed. The spell was first woven by temple guardians to hold possessed vessels until exorcisms could be attempted. Caster feels tugged at the wrists as if the chains are bidirectional, straining spirit against spirit.

skills.name: Guardian Spirit
skills.definition: The caster calls upon a spectral guardian, a tall shimmering figure that hovers protectively at their side. The guardian’s form is indistinct—some see a knight, others a robed ancestor, others a beast-totem—but its presence radiates unyielding defense. With a sweep of its arm or wing, it deflects incoming strikes; its mere aura dissuades hostile spirits from approaching. The guardian lasts only moments, but in that span it can turn aside a fatal blow or drive back dark entities. When it fades, its last glance carries silent encouragement, like a parent sending their child into the storm. In combat, allies cluster close, trusting the phantom bulwark. The caster, however, feels the weight: summoning a guardian demands opening one’s soul as anchor, leaving them subtly drained once it departs.

skills.name: Astral Step
skills.definition: The caster’s body flickers like a candle in wind, then splits into two forms—one remaining faintly visible, the other stepping through unseen corridors of soul-space. For an instant the caster feels stretched, like two notes of the same chord vibrating at once. Then, in a blink, they reappear yards away, leaving behind a fading after-image that bursts in a ripple of ghostly static. Onlookers gasp as the caster crosses impossible distance, circumventing barriers or repositioning behind foes. Though swift, it is not effortless: each step through the astral tears at the edges of one’s being, leaving a ghost-ache in marrow and mind. In lore, this spell is the first initiation into true astral travel, teaching soul mages how to slip sideways into realms between moments.

skills.name: Astral Maelstrom
skills.definition: The caster exhales sharply, and the air warps into a spiraling vortex of pale light and shadow. Ethereal tendrils lash outward, seizing spirits and flesh alike, pulling them toward the churning center. Within the maelstrom, voices scream in forgotten tongues; fraG.O.Dents of broken dreams swirl like debris. The zone distorts movement and balance, dragging enemies together while slowing their actions. Allies feel a similar tug but are cushioned by faint wards if within the caster’s favor. Onlookers see the battlefield bend unnaturally, like a whirlpool in water made of ghostlight. This spell is dangerous even to its wielder—losing grip could pull their own soul into the tide.

skills.name: Pale Legion
skills.definition: The caster closes their eyes and breathes out a plume of frost‑white essence. From the mist rise spectral warriors, translucent figures armed with ethereal weapons, their forms flickering like memories of battles long past. They march in silence, forming a phalanx around the caster and their allies. Each strike of the legion chills the spirit of enemies, sapping resolve and body alike. The summoned host is not fully real—they are echoes—but their presence overwhelms foes with fear and pressure, forcing openings for the living to exploit. Allies gain strength and courage from the guardians, fighting harder under the gaze of the ancestral host. When the spell ends, the legion fades into drifting motes, saluting before dissolving into nothing.

skills.name: Eclipse of Eternity
skills.definition: The caster’s eyes blacken as their soul flares outward, blotting the battlefield in a twilight dome of stillness. All sound warps into muffled echoes, colors fade to gray, and every creature feels their heartbeat thunder in their ears. Within the eclipse, souls are bared: phantoms of past deeds flicker around bodies, ancestral voices whisper in a dozen tongues, and mortality presses down like a weight. Enemy spirits find their anchors fraying; allies feel spectral hands at their shoulders, steadying them. The caster stands at the center, arms outstretched, threads of light and shadow stretching from their body into every creature in sight. The dome does not simply restrain or reveal—it judges, binding foes in place, bolstering allies, and threatening to pull the very essence of the unworthy into the void. Even when it ends, the battlefield feels hushed, as though the world itself pauses to recover from what it just witnessed.

skills.name: Summoning
skills.definition: Summoning calls creatures, spirits, or constructs across space, time, or realms. Whether temporary allies or long-term bindings, it brings the beyond into the present. Summoners must balance force with control.

skills.name: Find Familiar
skills.definition: A ritual of whispered names and a chalk‑marked circle calls forth a minor spirit in the guise of an animal companion. The familiar manifests with flickering eyes and a faint otherworldly hum, obeying simple commands and sharing quiet impressions with its summoner. It can deliver touch‑range spells and scout cautiously, but it is fragile and unwilling to engage in lethal violence unless the G.O.D. rules otherwise. Concentration keeps the bond taut; breaking it releases the spirit in a harmless puff of motes.

skills.name: Call Trinket
skills.definition: The caster slips their hand through a fold in space and retrieves a small object they already own—belt, pouch, or pack—into their palm. The item arrives with a faint shimmer and settles as if it had always been there. Ideal for clutch moments when rummaging would cost too much time.

skills.name: Spirit Lantern
skills.definition: The caster calls a gentle wisp from a neighboring plane, a palm‑sized mote that hovers at shoulder height and radiates steady light. It thrums softly, circling the caster and bobbing at points of interest with timid curiosity. While harmless, its presence is comforting and useful in darkness, provided the caster maintains focus.

skills.name: Summon Pack Beast
skills.definition: With a guttural call and a trace of planar energy, the caster summons a loyal but simple beast—a wolf, hound, or other medium animal—to fight or carry loads. The beast bursts into being with a shimmer of dust and growls at the caster’s foes. It obeys basic commands, vanishing when the spell ends. This spell shows how Target + Summon + Duration combine for battlefield utility.

skills.name: Phalanx of Echoes
skills.definition: The caster stomps the ground and ghostly soldiers march forth, semi-transparent echoes of ancient warriors. They form a loose wall, blocking passage and striking with spectral weapons. Though weak individually, together they harry enemies and shield allies. This demonstrates AoE + Summon + Shape synergy.

skills.name: Retrieve from Beyond
skills.definition: The caster reaches through a thin veil and draws an unattended object from afar. A book from a library shelf, a dropped weapon, or even a set of keys can be yanked into the caster’s hands. The air ripples as the object slides across space into the summoner’s grasp. This spell showcases Target + Summon + Spatial flavor.

skills.name: Summon Warband
skills.definition: With a thunderous chant and the rending of unseen veils, a half-dozen spectral warriors march forth in disciplined formation. Each wields a shimmering weapon and shields allies in their ranks. Their arrival echoes with the clash of unseen battlefields. The warband provides a temporary fighting force, able to harry enemies and defend positions. This spell demonstrates how multi-target + Summon + Duration + modifiers showcase scaling armies.

skills.name: Obsidian Guardian
skills.definition: By driving a shard of onyx into the earth, the caster summons forth a towering construct of stone and shadow. The guardian rises, broad-shouldered and immovable, its eyes glowing with runes of protection. This demonstrates Target + Summon Major + Control synergy.

skills.name: Circle of Binding
skills.definition: A glyph of glowing runes forms in a wide circle, dragging forth a struggling outsider. The creature claws and roars as glowing chains lash it to the circle’s edge. This demonstrates AoE container + Summon Major + Control + Shape.

skills.name: Concord of Ten Thousand
skills.definition: Runes lattice the air as rifts crack open. A disciplined cohort marches in—summoned individually—while a concurrent battle‑aura rolls over the field. Allies feel the rhythm and move in unison; enemies stumble and are shoved back by shield‑pressure as the air itself thickens. This build explicitly separates the “army creation” (Target + Multi‑Target + Summon) from the “formation field” (AoE + Buff + Debuff + Spatial + nested Control), so readers can see the modular assembly.

skills.name: Seal of the Eclipsed Gate
skills.definition: A bi‑CHAomatic ring unfurls and a gate to twin planes yawns wide. Two opposed outsiders are pulled through to clash while a time‑drag bubble locks the battleground. Gravity sways, courage surges in allies, and foes feel their will slow. This layout shows outer Temporal/Spatial anchoring a Spatial zone, with separate Target containers for two major summons, plus a dedicated Control container that immobilizes both.

skills.name: Eternal Concord of Realms
skills.definition: When this spell is cast, the battlefield itself becomes a convergence of planes. A monumental sigil ring burns into the ground, rising as a three-dimensional cube of glyph-lattices. Within the shimmering walls, armies stride forth: titanic guardians from one plane, spectral attendants from another, and shifting terrain drawn from both. Gravity flexes, the ground reshapes into ridged fortifications, and pact-threads lash every summoned to the caster’s command. Enemies who step into the cube are slowed and staggered by time-drag while allies feel a surge of courage and speed. At the caster’s word, the sigil flares again, banishing a chosen cadre of enemies in chains of light. The construct endures for the duration, undeniable proof that summoning is the art of weaving containers, not just opening doors.

skills.name: Time & Space
skills.definition: Time & Space magic manipulates flow, position, and perception. It may accelerate or delay actions, fold distances, or create pockets of stillness. This is a delicate sphere—one misstep can echo far beyond the present.

skills.name: Momentary Step
skills.definition: The caster flickers through space in the blink of an eye, stepping up to 15 feet to a visible space. Air ripples where they stood and snaps where they arrive, a faint echo lagging half a heartbeat behind. Perfect for slipping a grab, dodging into cover, or threading through tight terrain without provoking pursuit.

skills.name: Temporal Glimpse
skills.definition: The caster catches a flicker of the immediate future, as though a page from time briefly turned ahead. This allows them to adjust their reaction at the last moment, granting an edge against danger. The glimpse lasts only a heartbeat, fading before it can cause paradox.

skills.name: Slow Tether
skills.definition: With a subtle gesture, the caster tugs at the flow of time around a single target. The victim’s movements feel heavy, their steps dragging as though they wade through water. Though brief, the effect can tip the scales in fast-paced combat.

skills.name: Blink Step
skills.definition: The caster vanishes in a flicker of warped light and reappears at a chosen spot within 60 ft. Air snaps with displaced sound, and afterimages linger for a heartbeat. Useful for bypassing obstacles, dodging strikes, or slipping through gaps mid-battle.

skills.name: Stasis Snare
skills.definition: With a twisting gesture, the caster slows a foe’s time-flow, binding them as if trapped in syrupy air. Their limbs drag, thoughts stumble, and reaction falters. The snare fades after a round, but in that window, allies can strike freely.

skills.name: Spatial Anchor
skills.definition: The caster tears open a faint ripple in space and chains their foe to it. The target feels an invisible weight, like gravity fixed them in place. They cannot easily flee or be moved, pinned by unseen bonds of distance itself.

skills.name: Worldstride
skills.definition: The caster collapses their presence into a singular point, reemerging anywhere in the world within the same heartbeat. The transition is silent but marked by a faint smell of ozone and a shimmer like heat waves. Though instantaneous, the journey passes through dangerous void-currents—failed attempts can scatter pieces of the caster across the fabric of reality. This is the iconic “true teleport,” granting unmatched strategic freedom.

skills.name: CHAono-Burst
skills.definition: With a thunderous pulse, the caster creates a temporal bubble that distorts the speed of all caught within. Allies feel their actions accelerate, blades and spells blurring; enemies slow, staggering as though time is syrup. Within this zone, battles resolve in seconds that stretch like hours.

skills.name: Spatial Rend
skills.definition: The caster tears a jagged wound in space, creating a rift of crushing pressure. The distortion drags foes inward, bending light and air around it like a collapsing star. Those trapped near its edge feel bones stretch and weapons twist, while the center threatens annihilation.

skills.name: Gate
skills.definition: The caster rends reality into a stable shimmering archway, connecting two distant points. Through it, armies can march, caravans can pass, and entire cities can exchange goods in moments. The gate is not without peril: void echoes leak around its edge, and improper anchoring risks flinging travelers into the abyss between places. While open, the portal is a glaring beacon of power that distorts air, gravity, and magic around it.

skills.name: CHAono-Stasis Field
skills.definition: The caster freezes an entire battlefield in a shimmering dome of suspended time. Arrows halt in midair, flames pause as statues of fire, and creatures stand trapped in half-motion. Inside, only the caster (and optionally chosen allies) can still act, moving between frozen foes like phantoms through a painting. When the field collapses, all delayed events complete in an instant.

skills.name: Infinite Labyrinth
skills.definition: With a sweeping gesture, the caster folds reality into an endless maze of doors, corridors, and mirrored halls. Space twists into recursive geometry: enemies turn corners and find themselves back where they started, allies are scattered into parallel passages, and entire armies can vanish into the shifting construct. Distances stretch infinitely; even a single step may take hours, while a mile collapses into an arm’s reach. The labyrinth persists as a living paradox until it unravels, often leaving geography scarred and minds fractured. Villages may find themselves displaced miles away, fortresses may be turned inside-out, and those who wandered within may emerge days older or younger, or not at all.

skills.name: Transmutation
skills.definition: Transmutation alters the inherent nature of things. Lead becomes gold, water becomes gas, weakness becomes strength. This is the magic of change—refined, radical, or reversible.

skills.name: Mend Stone
skills.definition: The caster runs their hand across cracked stone, and the fraG.O.Dents fuse back together with a faint earthen glow. Chips and fractures vanish, leaving the surface restored to functional strength. This spell is often used for quick battlefield repairs or sealing breaches in walls.

skills.name: Purify Water
skills.definition: By dipping a hand into murky water, the caster draws out impurities which condense into a faint cloud before dissolving. The liquid clears instantly, becoming safe to drink. A classic spell for survivalists and travelers alike.

skills.name: Resize Trinket
skills.definition: A small trinket glows with shifting light as the caster wills it larger or smaller. The object changes size temporarily, useful for concealment, smuggling, or convenience.

skills.name: Shape Metal
skills.definition: The caster traces heatless sigils and the worked metal ripples like wax before settling into a new, serviceable form. Bars bend, plates seal, and crude hinges appear in moments. The effect is fast field‑craft, not master smithing; edges dull, tolerances are rough, and intricate mechanisms won’t survive. Sparks dance across the surface as stresses redistribute, then fade when the form locks.

skills.name: Enlarge Object
skills.definition: With a firm command, a mundane object swells to twice its size and weight. Shields become bulwarks, ladders bridge gaps, and tools gain brute leverage at the cost of finesse. The transformation glows briefly, then stabilizes for a short time before snapping back to normal.

skills.name: Stone to Mud
skills.definition: Stone darkens, slumps, and collapses into heavy mud under the caster’s touch. Walls sag, flagstones bog, and solid cover turns to a sucking mire in an instant. The created mud is mundane and remains unless otherwise altered by the scene.

skills.name: Forgeheart Wall
skills.definition: The caster slams their hands into the ground, forcing stone to surge up and harden into gleaming alloy. The wall hums with metallic resonance, shielding allies and reshaping the battlefield. Sparks and heat flare as mundane rock becomes a transmuted barrier, persisting until destroyed or dissipated.

skills.name: Chimeric Fusion
skills.definition: By binding two objects together, the caster fuses their essences into a hybrid form. A sword merges with a shield to become a cleaving guard; stone melds with wood into rigid planks. The union lasts only briefly, after which both items warp or splinter under the strain.

skills.name: Mass Resize
skills.definition: With a sweeping gesture, the caster alters scale itself. Weapons grow absurdly large or comically small, ladders stretch into bridges, and crates shrink into handheld bundles. The battlefield bends as proportions rebel against natural law.

skills.name: Worldshaper’s Maw
skills.definition: With a violent roar, the caster rends the battlefield itself. Stone liquefies, soil folds inward, and a jagged pit yawns open. Weapons and armor caught within warp and twist, their integrity failing. The area becomes an unstable zone where earth and matter ripple as if alive, threatening to drag all into the collapse.

skills.name: Eternal Alloy
skills.definition: The caster draws disparate elements together into a single indestructible form. Stone, wood, iron, and crystal fuse into an everlasting alloy that defies time. Weapons forged in the zone gain mythical hardness; walls reforged cannot be broken by mortal strength. The spell showcases true mastery of matter’s essence, creating material outside normal physics.

skills.name: Genesis Transmutation
skills.definition: At the pinnacle of alchemy, the caster becomes architect of reality itself. The battlefield trembles as stone flows like rivers, metals fuse into new alloys, and forests bloom or petrify in moments. Entire districts can be reshaped—mountains flattened into plains, deserts turned into fertile valleys, rivers redirected in their courses. The spell is not creation ex nihilo, but absolute reconstitution: what exists is rewritten into a new form. The effort shakes both the caster and the land, for such transformations echo beyond the moment of casting.

skills.name: Transformation
skills.definition: Transformation reshapes form without altering substance. Flesh turns to fur, limbs become wings, size expands or contracts. It’s the sphere of self-reinvention and adaptive physicality.

skills.name: Quickshift: Webbed Grip
skills.definition: Grants subtle webbing between fingers for temporary swim/climb aid. Appears as faint aquatic lineage and fades quickly.

skills.name: Skin of Scales (Lesser)
skills.definition: Faint scales ripple over skin, granting momentary resilience. Subtle sheen, effective vs. cuts for one combat step.

skills.name: Nocturne Pupils
skills.definition: Eyes shift to slitted nocturnal form, enhancing low-light sight but impairing bright vision.

skills.name: Gills of the Shorefolk
skills.definition: Throat splits lightly along the sides with faint frills that filter water. A bubbling inhale in the river becomes oxygen-rich breath. The skin darkens to damp hues while in use. Perfect for short-term underwater scouting or ambush setups.

skills.name: Chameleon Veil
skills.definition: Skin ripples with shifting piG.O.Dent, echoing the colors of walls, brush, or stone. To the eye the caster melts into their surroundings, though motion may still betray them. The body feels slick, like standing in a shadow that clings.

skills.name: Beast’s Limb
skills.definition: One of the caster’s arms bulges and shifts, bones elongating, nails sharpening into claws. Strength surges through the altered limb, muscles coiling with animal force. The arm feels alien but powerful.

skills.name: Wings of the Raptor
skills.definition: From the caster’s back burst broad pinions of sinew and feather. Each beat stirs air with heavy gusts, carrying them skyward with instinctive precision. To onlookers, the transformation is awe-striking, a sudden declaration of predatory dominion. In combat it allows flight above walls and foes, changing the battlefield into three dimensions.

skills.name: Packform Shift
skills.definition: Several allies sprout lean muscle and sharp canines, their frames twitching with bestial energy. Their eyes glow with the same primal hue, their unity undeniable. The battlefield feels suddenly crowded with predators hunting as one.

skills.name: Fleshbind Curse
skills.definition: With a guttural word, the foe’s limbs twist inward, their body reshaping against their will. Muscles knot, joints lock, and for a moment they are trapped in a body that betrays them. The effect is grotesque but short-lived, leaving lingering ache when it ends.

skills.name: Avatar of Chimera
skills.definition: Caster’s body tears and reforms, merging aspects of lion, serpent, and eagle into a terrifying hybrid. A mane bristles, scales plate across skin, and taloned wings unfurl with brutal majesty. Every movement is accompanied by a chorus of alien growls and shrieks. On the battlefield, this is both empowerment and intimidation: claws rend, wings buffet, tail lashes, and enemies falter before the monstrosity.

skills.name: Plagueform Wave
skills.definition: From the caster’s outstretched palm bursts a ripple of mutagenic force, spreading like distorted heatwaves. Flesh in the wave contorts: enemies twist into weakened, brittle forms, while allies briefly harden and grow resilient. To observers, the effect is horrific — a tide of simultaneous empowerment and decay across the battlefield. It leaves an aftertaste of dread even after the shapes fade.

skills.name: Genesis Metamorphosis
skills.definition: The caster becomes the axis of a living storm, radiating waves of rewriting force. Across a vast radius, allies erupt into perfected hybrid forms—gills, wings, claws, armored hides—each tailored instinctively to their needs. Enemies caught within the wave convulse, bodies betraying them as limbs twist, senses fail, and vitality drains away. Terrain itself grows warped: trees sprout flesh-like vines, stone ripples as if breathing, rivers teem with hybrid fish. The battlefield is transformed into a nightmare of shifting biology. This spell is legend: where it falls, tales of gods reborn in flesh and terror are whispered for centuries.

skills.name: Water
skills.definition: Water magic embodies flow, pressure, and adaptability. It may cleanse, crush, or conceal. Practitioners learn to harness water’s many forms—vapor, ice, and tide alike.

skills.name: Aqua Lash
skills.definition: A crisp ribbon of water coils from the caster’s hand and snaps forward with a clean, cutting strike. The impact stings and splashes, dousing embers and leaving a cool mist in the air. Simple and efficient, it’s a starter technique that scales with the practitioner’s growing command of water and storm.

skills.name: Ripple Shot
skills.definition: A bead of water swells at the caster’s fingertip, clear and sharp as glass. With a flick, it shoots forward in a straight line, whistling faintly as it cuts the air. On impact, the droplet bursts in a splash that stings flesh and dampens armor, leaving slick trails where it strikes. While minor in force, its precision and speed echo the inevitability of ripples spreading across a still pond.

skills.name: Soothing Stream
skills.definition: The caster channels a thin stream of cool water over a wound, the liquid glowing faintly as it closes cuts and restores vitality. The soothing stream leaves behind a feeling of calm renewal, though it requires the caster’s steady hand to maintain focus.

skills.name: Tide Push
skills.definition: With a sweeping gesture, the caster conjures a sudden surge of water in a broad cone. The tide crashes forward like a small wave, striking all caught in its path with surprising force. Enemies are shoved back, footing is drenched, and light objects scatter in the spray. Though lacking raw damage, the sheer momentum of water creates space and disrupts enemy formations.

skills.name: Charged Grasp
skills.definition: The caster channels water’s conductivity, charging their hand with crackling energy. Upon contact, a jolt of lightning arcs into the target, coursing along moisture and metal with violent precision. The strike seizes muscles, shocks nerves, and can arc faintly into adjacent water sources. Though risky to use in melee, its raw electrical surge embodies the dangerous synergy between water and storm.

skills.name: Bubble Veil
skills.definition: The caster surrounds themselves in a thin veil of swirling water bubbles. Each droplet refracts incoming blows, scattering force and dispersing energy like ripples through a pond. The veil does not block attacks entirely, but it softens the impact of weapons and dampens fire, lightning, or other elemental strikes. With focus, the caster maintains the shimmering barrier, its surface endlessly flowing to absorb punishment.

skills.name: Riptide Grasp
skills.definition: The caster conjures a surge of water shaped like grasping tendrils, which whip outward to seize a foe. The torrent coils around their body, striking with bruising force before constricting them in place. Each moment of resistance only tightens the watery grip, dragging the victim down as though drowning in an invisible current.

skills.name: Stormcall Surge
skills.definition: A swirling storm node manifests at the chosen point, a sphere of roaring wind and crackling arcs. Lightning lashes outward at everything within its reach, searing flesh and metal alike. The very air thickens with pressure, movement falters as though wading through a tempest, and sound is muffled by the roar of static. The spell teeters on the edge of control — one slip, and the storm may turn on its master.

skills.name: Tide Wall
skills.definition: The caster raises a surging wall of water that roars up like a tidal barrier. Projectiles slam into it only to be caught and dragged downward, their momentum swallowed. Fire gutters and dies as the wall steams, its volume absorbing the heat. For the spell’s brief existence, allies can rally behind its cover, fighting as if shielded by the sea itself.

skills.name: Maelstrom
skills.definition: The caster summons a roaring vortex of water and distorted space. The swirling maelstrom drags everything within its reach toward the center, battering victims with crushing currents. The pull is irresistible, and even the air warps within, making escape sluggish and clumsy. The vortex threatens to consume friend and foe alike, and without firm focus, even the caster may be swept into its grasp.

skills.name: Tempest Crown
skills.definition: The caster becomes the eye of a raging storm, lightning crackling outward in a halo of electrified rain and warped air. Foes near the caster feel their movements sluggish, their strikes unsteady, and bolts of lightning lash them without warning. Allies within the storm’s heart are shielded by surging waves of force, though the caster risks being caught in the overload of their own tempest.

skills.name: Leviathan’s Awakening
skills.definition: The caster calls forth the Leviathan — not a creature, but a world-shaking embodiment of water’s wrath. A towering avatar of surging tides erupts, its body churning with lightning arcs and warped space. Within its massive form, time stutters: movements freeze mid-stroke, voices drown in silence. Tentacles of current and flood lash outward, sweeping foes from their feet, restraining them in suffocating torrents. At its core, those seized by the Leviathan are pulled into a watery void — banished beyond reality to drown in silence until the spell ends. Allies quake, the land itself buckles, and even the caster risks being consumed by the ancient tide they dared awaken.

skills.name: Wind
skills.definition: Wind magic channels movement, breath, and directional force. It guides arrows, lifts voices, and carries storms. Wind is both freedom and fury, guided by precision or set loose with abandon.

skills.name: Gust of Renewal
skills.definition: A focused burst of air surges outward from the caster, shoving a target back and clearing the immediate space of smoke or dust. Though minor at first, the spell grows with the caster’s command of wind, evolving from small shoves into sweeping gales that can topple armies.

skills.name: Cutting Draft
skills.definition: A sharp hiss splits the air as the caster flicks their hand, sending a razor-thin current of compressed wind toward a foe. The draft slices flesh and cloth with invisible precision, leaving shallow cuts. In combat it’s a light, quick strike to sting and distract; outside battle it can part rope, banners, or parchment with effortless neatness. While dangerous, the force lacks depth—armor and stone remain untouched.

skills.name: Air Needle
skills.definition: A pin-thin filament of compressed air snaps from the caster’s hand with a soft hiss. It slices skin and cloth, leaving a sting more felt than seen. In battle it’s a precise poke to draw blood; in the field it cleanly parts rope or parchment. The magic fades the instant the pressure is released.

skills.name: Suffocating Grasp
skills.definition: The caster clenches their hand, and the air within a foe’s lungs vanishes in an instant. Victims clutch at their chest as breath fails them, leaving them staggered and terrified. Though brief, the spell disrupts combat rhythm and can decide a duel in seconds. In lore, wind mages call this the “Grasp of the Airless Hand.”

skills.name: Wind Step
skills.definition: Wind gathers around the caster’s legs and chest, lifting them in a sudden burst. The mage is carried forward on a compressed current, surging across the battlefield with startling speed. To others it looks like a blur of displaced air, not disappearance—an agile sprint made supernatural by elemental force. In lore, duelists spoke of Wind Steppers as those who never stood where the blade struck.

skills.name: Whispering Zephyr
skills.definition: The caster breathes a word into the air, and the breeze carries it to another within range. The voice is heard as though whispered directly at the target’s ear, clear and unmistakable. In combat this allows silent coordination; in lore, wind messengers were prized among spies and lovers alike.

skills.name: Cyclone Prison
skills.definition: Air erupts into a towering spiral, enclosing enemies in a shrieking vortex. The cyclone drags them inward, battering with debris and pressure. On the battlefield it isolates groups, cutting them off from allies while whittling them down. In lore, Wind Masters are said to “build cages from breath itself.”

skills.name: Suffocating Dome
skills.definition: Air rushes outward with a sudden roar, then vanishes into a dead hush as the caster forms a dome of stillness. Inside, the very breath is stolen: lungs burn, voices choke silent, and flames gutter out. Soldiers stagger and claw for air, their cries muted by the weight of emptiness. To generals, it is a weapon of terror; to sages, the “Silent Glass,” proof that even wind can become absence.

skills.name: Tempest Barrage
skills.definition: The caster summons a roaring gale threaded with lightning, hurling arcs of air blades and storm bolts across the battlefield. Foes are slashed, knocked prone, and their morale falters in the cacophony. In story, such storms are omens of gods stirring.

skills.name: Storm Nexus
skills.definition: Dark clouds coil overhead as a roaring cyclone forms, crackling with lightning. Within its sphere, winds howl with shredding force, hurling foes to the ground while bolts arc wildly. The battlefield becomes a maelstrom of fury: sight obscured, movement crippled, and even the caster risks being caught in the chaos. In lore, it is said that summoning the Nexus calls the attention of storm gods themselves.

skills.name: Worldstorm
skills.definition: With a sky-shattering roar, the mage tears open the heavens. A rift in the firmament births cyclones, lightning, and sheets of rain. Yet the true horror is not the damage—it is the reshaping of the world itself: forests flattened, rivers redirected, and battlegrounds unrecognizable. Armies vanish in the maelstrom, while legends speak of entire kingdoms scarred forever by a single invocation.

skills.name: Clairsentience
skills.definition: Clairsentience expands perception beyond normal senses. It allows the user to detect presences, gain insight through intuition, or see what others cannot. This discipline doesn’t guess—it knows.

skills.name: Object Echo
skills.definition: By brushing their hand across an object, the psion glimpses faint echoes of its most recent interactions. Fleeting impressions of touch, emotion, or use bleed into the caster’s awareness—enough to sense who last handled the object or the strongest emotion tied to it.

skills.name: Danger Sense
skills.definition: A sudden surge of awareness heightens the psion’s instincts. Subtle shifts—creaking boards, held breath, hostile intent—flare in the mind, letting the psion react a beat ahead of danger.

skills.name: Aura Glimpse
skills.definition: The psion narrows their focus upon a living aura and, for a heartbeat, perceives the colors and ripples of surface emotion and intent—truths that flicker just beneath the mask.

skills.name: Thread of Fate
skills.definition: By focusing on a person or object, the psion glimpses a faint thread of probability extending into the near future. They sense whether danger, opportunity, or neutrality is most likely within the next few steps. These insights are vague but allow preparation against imminent shifts.

skills.name: Echo Reading
skills.definition: The psion attunes to a room or area, sensing the lingering echoes of presence. Footsteps, words, or emotions reverberate faintly, painting an impression of who or what has been there recently. In crowded places, impressions blur together, requiring focus to isolate useful details.

skills.name: Aura Veil Pierce
skills.definition: With effort, the psion pushes past surface impressions to pierce deeper layers of an aura. Subtle flickers reveal concealed motives, illness, or lies woven into intent. For the spell’s span, they may test truth against aura flow, discerning deception with greater clarity.

skills.name: Web of Insight
skills.definition: The psion threads together the unseen ties between people, objects, and places in their sight. Lines of connection glow faintly, revealing who is bonded, hostile, or tied by recent events. In combat, this allows anticipating coordinated moves and uncovering hidden relationships between enemies and allies alike.

skills.name: Foresight Step
skills.definition: By splitting awareness across branching futures, the psion glimpses what is about to occur moments ahead. They align their body with the “most favorable” path, moving or acting with uncanny timing. Enemies’ strikes are anticipated, allies’ openings foreseen, and actions unfold as if rehearsed.

skills.name: Echo Chamber
skills.definition: The psion extends their mind across a large chamber, filling it with the resonant “echo” of perception. Whispers, movements, and hidden passages vibrate like struck chords, revealing all presences and motions within. Illusions falter in this resonance, their frequencies discordant to the psion’s tuned awareness.

skills.name: Threads of Destiny
skills.definition: The psion perceives dozens of branching futures radiating from those around them, shimmering like spiderwebs of probability. For a brief span, they may tug these threads to steer fate slightly—guiding allies away from danger and into opportunity, while making enemies stumble into misfortune. The battlefield feels orchestrated, as if every motion had already been rehearsed.

skills.name: World’s Whisper
skills.definition: The psion sinks into the resonant hum of the land itself, their awareness spreading across a vast zone. Every heartbeat, every breath, every concealed presence sings into their perception. Nothing can hide—the psion feels footsteps underground, invisible creatures in the air, even shifting emotions of an entire crowd. Enemies find stealth impossible while this resonance lasts.

skills.name: Eyes Beyond Time
skills.definition: The psion opens their perception beyond the linear flow of time. For an instant, they stand within a storm of countless pasts, presents, and possible futures. They glimpse every strike before it lands, every deception before it is spoken, every hidden thing before it moves. For a fleeting span, the battlefield bends to their awareness—foes stumble into predicted blows, allies move in perfect synCHAonicity, and even the flow of events seems to “correct” itself around the psion’s foresight.

skills.name: Metacreativity
skills.definition: Metacreativity draws from the mind to manifest objects, structures, or tools into temporary existence. It is imagination made tangible—an expression of will shaping the real.

skills.name: Mind-Forge Tool
skills.definition: A thin gleam knots in your palm and unspools into a crisp, semi-solid tool shaped by intent. The construct looks like faceted glass overlaid with faint runes, yet it handles like tempered steel. You decide the form as it appears—lockpick, screwdriver, pry bar, piton, chalk stylus, or another simple implement. The tool hums with a quiet resonance that steadies the hand and resists slipping, but when the moment passes it fractures into motes of light.

skills.name: Force Buckler
skills.definition: A disc of force blossoms from your forearm like a blooming, hex-tiled shield. The surface ripples to meet incoming strikes, redistributing momentum across a psionic lattice. It is weightless to you but solid to anything that touches it, and when the urgency fades the shield contracts to a coin of radiance and winks out.

skills.name: Psi-Edge Blade
skills.definition: A slender blade of condensed intent extrudes from your grip with a low, harmonic hum. Its edge is a hair-thin seam of light that lengthens or shortens to match your style. The weapon balances perfectly, guiding the wrist into clean cuts. The edge is more agreement than matter, and it fades if your focus drifts.

skills.name: Ectoplasmic Barrier
skills.definition: Your outstretched hand sketches glowing lines in the air that harden into a semi-transparent wall. The barrier hums with psionic energy, faint hexagons rippling across its surface like overlapping shields. Arrows thud and flatten, spells splash into harmless sparks, and charging foes are brought to a sudden halt. The wall’s integrity depends on your focus and dissipates once the moment has passed. The effect is as much psychological as physical—opponents hesitate when faced with a defense literally pulled from thought.

skills.name: Ephemeral Ally
skills.definition: You extend your will outward, and translucent light condenses into the shape of a hound-like guardian. The construct moves with eerie precision, guided by your subconscious commands. Its body is semi-solid, enough to bite or block an enemy, but collapses into misty shards if struck down. The ally acts as an extension of your mind, defending flanks or harassing vulnerable targets. Though fragile, its sudden manifestation shifts momentum on the battlefield.

skills.name: Force Lance
skills.definition: A spear of crystallized thought projects from your hand and shoots forward in a straight, piercing line. The lance glows with a sharp inner fire, humming as it cuts through air and armor alike. Enemies struck feel the weight of will as much as impact. The lance dissipates after impact, shattering into sparkling fraG.O.Dents of psionic residue. It is as much a test of the caster’s focus as it is a weapon, demanding precision of aim.

skills.name: Citadel of Thought
skills.definition: You extend your arms and the battlefield responds—panels of translucent psionic stone rise from nothing, clicking into place like puzzle pieces until a fortress wall surrounds your position. The structure towers above, complete with crenellations and angled buttresses. Each block glows faintly with glyphs of will, humming with pressure as if bracing against reality itself. The citadel offers allies cover and limits enemy movement, reshaping the tactical field in an instant. When the construct fades, the blocks fracture into drifting shards of thoughtstuff, dissolving like sand in the tide.

skills.name: Eidolon Construct
skills.definition: An imposing figure emerges beside you—a humanoid construct forged from glimmering psionic plates. Its eyes glow with borrowed will, its limbs powered by latticework energy. This eidolon acts as an autonomous ally, defending, striking, and interposing itself without direct command. Its form is unmistakably artificial, but it radiates presence and authority, causing hesitation among foes. The construct obeys broad intentions (defend me, attack them) rather than micromanaged instructions, freeing you to focus on the battle. When destroyed or dismissed, it breaks into shards of luminous crystal that scatter like fireflies.

skills.name: Reality Armory
skills.definition: Weapons and armor shimmer into existence around you and your allies—a storm of conjured blades, bows, and shields, each tailored to its wielder’s grip. The constructs appear weightless until grasped, then solidify with a satisfying heft. Armor molds to fit, scaling to protect the body without hindrance. These are not mundane tools but psionic resonances of ideal forms—always sharp, always balanced, always resilient. The sight of a squad suddenly armed by sheer thought is often enough to shift the tide of battle before the first blow is struck. When the duration ends, the armory dissolves like dust in sunlight.

skills.name: Colossus of Will
skills.definition: You call upon the depths of your mind and the ground trembles as a towering psionic construct rises—a colossal golem of faceted crystal and light. Standing thirty feet tall, it moves with deliberate force, each step shaking the battlefield. Its fists strike like siege engines, and its body shields allies behind it. Though limited in awareness, it obeys your intent with simple clarity: guard, strike, or block. Foes behold not just a giant, but the embodiment of unyielding imagination. When the construct fades, shards of radiant crystal rain down, scattering like broken dreams.

skills.name: Reality Bastion
skills.definition: You anchor your mind to the fabric of existence and unfold a bastion of psionic architecture—walls, towers, and radiant barriers interlock in a vast defensive zone. The fortress encompasses a wide area, creating ramparts and bulwarks that shift slightly to block incoming strikes. Inside the zone, allies feel a sense of safety as their steps fall in rhythm with the construct’s pulse. To enemies, the space becomes a gauntlet of shifting cover and choking routes. The bastion’s sheer presence alters the flow of battle, carving order into chaos. When it collapses, the sound is like glass breaking across the horizon.

skills.name: Eternal Citadel
skills.definition: Your will pours outward in an overwhelming cascade, rewriting the battlefield into a sprawling psionic citadel. Towers rise with crystalline spires, walls knit together from lattices of pure thought, and vast gates seal with glowing glyphs. Within its bounds, allies feel bolstered, as though the fortress itself breathes with them; enemies are crushed beneath the pressure of absolute structure, every movement met with resistance. The citadel warps the field into an ordered domain under your control—corridors channel combatants, vantage towers grant advantage to allies, and walls bar escape. It is more than a construct: it is a living idea, a fortress of mindstuff projected into the world. When it collapses, shards linger as psychic ruins—unstable terrain that resonates for days, haunting the minds of those who fought there.

skills.name: Psychoportation
skills.definition: Psychoportation bends space through sheer intent. It enables movement without travel—blinking, shifting, or displacing across distances without physical action.

skills.name: Dimensional Peek
skills.definition: The psion stills their breath and lets their awareness slip sideways through the weave of space. A glossy ripple passes over their eyes like light across oil, and for an instant they perceive what lies just beyond a barrier, around a corner, or on the far side of a sealed door. Sound smears into a dull hum, colors flatten, and then snap back as the glimpse ends. On the battlefield, this lets them check a choke point or confirm an ambush without exposing their body. Outside combat, it reveals hidden alcoves, stashed packs, or lurking threats. The effect is brief and imperfect, more like a snapshot than a steady view.

skills.name: Echo Step (Minor Boost)
skills.definition: The psion gathers a taut crease of space beneath their heels, then releases it in a whispering pop. For a heartbeat their outline smears, leaving a faint after-image that seems to lag behind the body. The world feels a touch slower, footsteps landing in just the right gaps and angles. In combat, this micro-surge smooths a sprint from cover to cover or shaves the edge off an enemy’s timing. Outside battle it helps with tight jumps, quick dashes, or slipping through a crowd. The effect is subtle, not a full teleport, but it builds the reflexes psychoporters need for larger jumps.

skills.name: Spatial Veil
skills.definition: The psion pinches a fold of air and drapes it across themselves like a heat-haze cloak. Edges warp, lines misalign, and the eye slides across their outline as if focus refuses to land. On a crowded field this shimmer makes strikes just a hair off, arrows clipping where the body was a blink ago. The veil does not render them invisible; it merely scrambles the world’s attempt to pin their exact position. It is quick to raise and quick to fall, perfect for a decisive moment such as closing distance or slipping from a sightline. Though fleeting, it often turns a lethal blow into a near miss.

skills.name: Blink
skills.definition: The psion inhales sharply and vanishes in a ripple of warped air, reappearing in the blink of an eye. To allies and enemies alike, it appears as though they skipped a frame of reality itself. This trick allows apprentices to dodge an incoming blow, escape a tight bind, or move into a better position. It is limited in range, but mastering it is the first step toward bending space itself.

skills.name: Phase Hand
skills.definition: The psion presses their palm to a wall or chain, and their hand slides through solid matter as if it were mist. The sensation is cold, tingling, and unsettling. Apprentices use this to scout past barriers or slip bindings, though the danger is real—if focus fails, the body protests violently against occupying two states at once.

skills.name: Anchor Blink
skills.definition: The psion hurls a mental anchor at a chosen point, then reels themselves to it instantly, space collapsing in a whip-snap. A shimmer of distortion marks the arrival, like a stitch closing in reality. Apprentices use this to break grapples or close a gap, but misjudged anchors can leave them exposed.

skills.name: Blink Assault
skills.definition: The psion folds space around themselves, vanishing and reappearing in a flurry of disjointed steps that confound the eye. To enemies, it is as though three copies of the caster exist at once, each one striking from a different angle. In reality, the psion blinks between positions faster than thought, disorienting opponents and landing blows in their wake. The battlefield shakes with distorted echoes as their presence skips across the map. This spell makes the psychoporter a blur of offense, darting between foes before they can react.

skills.name: Phase Passage
skills.definition: With a sweeping gesture, the psion draws a door in the air, space parting like a curtain. A shimmering gateway yawns open, its edges wavering as though underwater. For a brief time, allies may step through, emerging safely on the other side of a barrier or across dangerous ground. The passage is fragile and unstable, its edges sparking with warped light, but it can save an entire group in desperate situations.

skills.name: Dimensional Anchor
skills.definition: The psion slams a hand outward and the air shatters like glass, invisible lines snapping into place around the target. Space itself clenches, fixing them to one point and preventing escape by physical or magical means. A shimmering net of warped light crackles around the victim, binding them to their position as though nailed to reality itself. This spell is feared by fellow psions, for it denies their greatest defense—mobility.

skills.name: Cataclysmic Rift
skills.definition: The psion tears open a jagged wound in space, splitting the battlefield with a gaping chasm of distorted dimensions. Gravity howls inward, dragging combatants and objects toward the shimmering edge. The rift is not truly a hole in the ground but a breach in reality itself, its edges shimmering with impossible colors. Foes tumble screaming into nowhere, while allies cling desperately to stay clear. The ground vibrates, sound fractures, and for a brief moment, the world feels as though it will come apart.

skills.name: Phase Exodus
skills.definition: The psion lifts their arms as if opening curtains, and a shimmering aurora descends over their allies. With a thought, they vanish in a cascade of light, stepping all at once into a folded corridor of unreality. For a heartbeat they traverse an endless crystal hall, then emerge miles away in perfect formation. The shift shakes stomachs and rattles bones, but it pulls an entire company from certain death to safety in the blink of an eye.

skills.name: Eternal Horizon Gate
skills.definition: The psion spreads their hands wide, and reality groans as if under titanic strain. A colossal arch of blinding light rises, tall enough to scrape the sky, its interior filled with rolling storms of stars and shadow. The air warps, drawing nearby objects toward the gate like a tide. With one step, an army may vanish into new lands or strange realms; with another, a city may be evacuated in moments. The caster feels the weight of infinity pressing down, for the gate does not simply connect two points — it writes a permanent scar between them. Where once there was distance, now there is none. Legends tell of psychoporters who used this art to redraw the maps of nations in a single night. Few survive the toll, for to open the horizon is to invite the infinite.

skills.name: Psychokinesis
skills.definition: Psychokinesis is force without form—movement, vibration, and kinetic energy directed by thought alone. From lifting objects to striking enemies, the mind becomes a physical force.

skills.name: Ember Spark
skills.definition: From the psion’s hand flares a sudden glimmer of heat, a spark called from thought alone. The flame leaps into existence with a faint hiss as the air itself combusts under mental command. A streak of fire darts forward in a jagged line, striking a single target with searing precision. The flash illuminates nearby shadows, throwing the battlefield into brief relief. Enemies struck feel the sharp sting of burning flesh and the acrid smoke that clings to skin. Though minor, the damage is immediate and undeniable, a lesson in the destructive promise of elemental will. Tactically, this spell provides a quick ranged strike, offering the psion a reliable opener. Its reach allows the caster to stay just out of melee range, while still engaging enemies with force. Lore whispers that the first psychokinetics trained by igniting their own sparks as proof of awakening. It is a spell as much symbolic as functional: the flame that begins the greater blaze.

skills.name: Stone Rattle
skills.definition: With a single stomp or clenched thought, the psion calls the ground to life. Stones grind against one another, the earth quivers in protest, and a shudder ripples beneath the chosen target. Dust leaps upward as though startled, and cracks vein outward from the point of impact. The effect strikes balance and confidence, causing a brief stagger and a strike of bruising force. On the battlefield, this creates both a visual distraction and a functional disruption of footing. The sudden tremor makes enemies hesitate, giving allies a window to press the attack. Tactically, it is best used in melee to disorient a foe and make follow-up strikes more effective. Ancient training scrolls suggest Stone Rattle was favored by novices learning to link mind with matter, a simple but potent expression of earth’s resonance. The spell echoes a truth of psychokinesis: even the smallest vibration can alter the flow of combat.

skills.name: Gust Lash
skills.definition: The psion sweeps their arm or focuses their will, and the air itself hardens into a cutting lash. A burst of pressure arcs outward in a sharp strike, striking the target with stinging impact. The sudden gust rattles clothing, snaps hair back, and forces the body to yield to invisible momentum. Enemies are shoved backward, their stance thrown off by the unexpected force. On the battlefield, Gust Lash is a control tool—used to break charges, push enemies away, or clear space for regrouping. The damage is absent by design; the value is distance and tempo. Tactically, it shines when employed to keep foes from closing into melee or to shove them into hazards. The lore of wind-wielders says this technique mirrors the “first breath of the storm,” a warning before greater power arrives. It is the subtle assertion of control: air as a weapon, not just a resource.

skills.name: Flame Jet
skills.definition: With a snap of focus, the psion ignites raw oxygen and will into a stream of fire. A roaring jet of flame bursts outward in a short cone, lighting the battlefield in crackling orange light. The heat singes hair, chars armor, and blackens stone in its wake. Enemies within the jet stagger from the sudden blast, their footing weakened by searing pain. Tactically, this spell clears groups of tightly packed enemies and controls chokepoints. The spell is a direct escalation from the apprentice’s spark—no longer a flicker, but a blaze that consumes. Lore calls it the “psion’s torch,” the first sign they command more than minor embers.

skills.name: Rock Shard
skills.definition: With a sharp gesture, the psion rips loose a fraG.O.Dent of stone and hurls it forward with crushing speed. The shard whistles through the air before slamming into its target with bone-cracking force. Dust and splinters of rock scatter outward, leaving a visible scar upon the battlefield. Enemies hit feel the weight of earth turned against them, as though the mountain itself chose to strike. Tactically, this spell gives psions a ranged kinetic strike, useful when melee is too dangerous. Lore holds that many young earth-shapers first prove themselves by felling a beast with a conjured stone.

skills.name: Wind Shear
skills.definition: Air gathers in a vibrating hum, then lashes outward in a crescent wave of cutting force. The invisible strike slices through the battlefield, ruffling banners, tossing debris, and striking all caught within its sweep. Those struck feel both the sting of the slicing air and the shove of raw momentum. Tactically, Wind Shear is valued for crowd control, disrupting advancing lines and punishing clustered formations. Lore paints it as the echo of great storms—psions reaching into the breath of the sky to carve their foes apart.

skills.name: Molten Surge
skills.definition: The psion slams their will into the earth, causing molten rock to burst upward in a fountain of fire and stone. The ground splits, spewing maG.O.Da and searing fraG.O.Dents in a roaring column. Enemies caught in the eruption are burned, battered, and forced to stagger back from the heat. The battlefield becomes a searing hazard, glowing cracks marking the terrain. Tactically, this spell is used to break clustered formations and deny ground, turning open space into a hazard zone. Lore whispers that this technique comes from ancient psions who sought to imitate volcanoes, channeling the destructive heart of the world itself.

skills.name: Lightning Chain
skills.definition: An arc of lightning leaps from the psion’s hand to strike a foe, then dances onward in jagged forks to strike others nearby. The air fills with the crackle of ozone and the blinding flash of electricity. Each target struck convulses under the shock, muscles locking, weapons clattering from nerveless hands. The battlefield becomes a dance of sparks as enemies are struck in sequence. Tactically, Lightning Chain punishes groups, spreading damage across multiple opponents with ruthless efficiency. Legends tell of storms given will, striking not once but many times in jagged rhythm.

skills.name: Crushing Grasp
skills.definition: The psion extends an invisible hand of raw force that seizes an enemy, wrapping them in an intangible but unyielding grip. Bones creak as the unseen pressure tightens, holding the foe aloft or pinning them to the ground. The target struggles as if in the fist of a giant, unable to break free without immense effort. Around them, dust and debris whip about as the force manifests visibly to all. Tactically, this spell removes a single enemy from the fight, immobilizing them and slowly crushing their strength. Lore names this the “giant’s hand,” the psion made titan through will alone.

skills.name: Maelstrom Vortex
skills.definition: With a thunderous roar, the psion twists elemental forces into a whirling vortex of water, wind, and debris. The battlefield erupts as a storm-center forms, dragging enemies toward its heart. Those caught inside are battered by shards of stone, razor winds, and crushing water currents. The roar deafens allies and foes alike, the ground shuddering under its pull. Tactically, this spell dominates terrain, locking groups of enemies into a zone of chaos where movement is near impossible. It is best used to disrupt entire armies or break sieges. Lore paints this technique as the psion’s ultimate defiance, calling the chaos of nature itself to swallow all who stand against them.

skills.name: Seismic Rupture
skills.definition: The psion drives their will into the earth itself, causing an eruption of devastating earthquakes. The ground splits open, stone heaves upward, and shockwaves ripple outward in deadly pulses. Buildings crack, walls topple, and enemies stumble helplessly in the chaos. Fissures glow faintly as latent maG.O.Da seeps through, the earth itself screaming as it reshapes. Tactically, this spell devastates fortifications, topples lines of defense, and crushes those caught unaware. The quake reshapes the battlefield, leaving terrain forever changed. Lore marks this power as forbidden, for it blurs the line between psion and natural disaster.

skills.name: Cataclysm
skills.definition: With a single overwhelming exertion of will, the psion calls forth the fury of all four elements in catastrophic harmony. The ground splits into molten chasms as fire erupts skyward. Cyclones roar into being, ripping trees and fortifications from their foundations. Walls of water crash down in impossible tides, drowning the battlefield in chaos. Lightning arcs wildly from storm clouds that coil overhead, striking ground and flesh alike with relentless fury. The world itself seems to convulse, reshaped into a zone of annihilation. Tactically, Cataclysm is both battlefield eraser and ultimate deterrent, obliterating entire armies or fortresses in one act. Few survive its casting; fewer still survive its aftermath, where terrain lies forever scarred. Lore speaks of psions who invoked this only once, collapsing under the strain, their bodies burned out as conduits for destruction too great for any mortal. This spell is not just an attack — it is a rewriting of nature’s law under the weight of thought.

skills.name: Psychometabolism
skills.definition: Psychometabolism controls the body from within—healing, enhancing, or adapting it through mental command. With this discipline, the mind rewrites the flesh.

skills.name: Cellular Mend
skills.definition: With a breath drawn inward, the psion visualizes strands of light knitting through torn flesh. A soft warmth radiates from within, not imposed from outside but summoned by the body’s own accelerated will to survive. Wounds close with faint luminescent lines, fading to scars that quickly soften. On the battlefield, this is a quick patch—not full restoration, but a stabilizing anchor that keeps an ally or the psion themselves in the fight. Practitioners describe the sensation as both exhausting and soothing, the body racing ahead of its natural pace. It is most effective for minor cuts and bruises, but can buy time against deeper injuries. The spell teaches discipline early on—every mend reminds the psion that flesh and thought are inseparable.

skills.name: Adrenal Surge
skills.definition: The psion focuses on their heartbeat, coaxing it into a rapid but controlled rhythm. Heat surges through the veins as muscle fibers tighten and reflexes sharpen. For a brief window, strength and speed flare to superhuman levels, empowering strikes or evasions that would otherwise be impossible. This spell manifests with a red flush to the skin, dilated pupils, and trembling readiness. On the battlefield, it is the difference between being caught and slipping free, or between landing a decisive blow and faltering. The drawback is equally clear—once the surge fades, the body aches with the rebound of forced exertion. Students of psychometabolism learn restraint here, for overuse burns the candle at both ends.

skills.name: Metabolic Purge
skills.definition: Closing their eyes, the psion visualizes impurities as shadows within the bloodstream. With a mental push, sweat beads and a sharp chill runs through the body as toxins, alcohol, or fatigue burn away. The caster coughs or shivers as the body expels what does not belong, leaving them clearer, sharper, and lighter. In combat, this allows a poisoned ally to fight on, or the psion to shrug off exhaustion mid-battle. It is not without risk—the body feels wrung out afterward, as though sprinting a marathon in seconds. The spell is often accompanied by a faint smell of iron or bitter herbs, depending on the user’s psyche. Philosophically, it embodies the psychometabolist’s creed: that impurity is a choice, and resilience is discipline made flesh.

skills.name: Cellular Regeneration
skills.definition: Concentrating inward, the psion floods their cells with restorative energy, accelerating natural repair. Wounds close, bruises fade, and fatigue lightens as the body knits itself with uncanny speed. Skin glows faintly as if lit from beneath, and the target feels a buzzing warmth spreading through every limb. The healing is powerful but taxing; the body often needs extra rest after the process, as accelerated growth takes a toll. In battle, it can mean the difference between collapse and standing strong.

skills.name: Iron Skin
skills.definition: By sheer force of will, the psion hardens flesh and bone until they gleam faintly with a metallic sheen. Strikes that would normally cut or bruise rebound or scrape with sparks. To observers, the skin looks like living steel: rigid under blows yet supple in motion. When the effect fades, bruises blossom and the body aches from strain, as though it had borne the weight of armor from within.

skills.name: Metabolic Burn
skills.definition: The psion accelerates their body’s metabolism to a fever pitch, burning reserves for explosive power. Muscles swell, eyes sharpen, and heat radiates from the skin. For a short time, the body pushes beyond its natural limits, granting both offense and speed. The aftermath is severe exhaustion: the body trembles, drenched in sweat, as though recovering from illness. Used wisely, it can end fights before its toll is felt.

skills.name: Hypermetabolic Overdrive
skills.definition: The psion ignites every cell into furious overdrive: muscles flex beyond their safe capacity, heart and lungs pound like war drums, and eyes blaze with raw focus. The caster or chosen ally becomes a storm of motion and violence, striking harder and moving faster than biology should allow. Flesh steams with heat, weapons strike with unnatural precision, and enemies can scarcely keep up. When the overdrive ends, the body crashes—trembling and aching as if it burned weeks of energy in moments.

skills.name: Adaptive Regeneration
skills.definition: The psion channels healing into not just recovery, but adaptation. Wounds close, scars fade, and the body re-grows stronger in the process: bones mend denser, skin thickens, and reflexes sharpen. The target feels a buzzing vitality as damage is undone and resilience reinforced; afterward, intense hunger and soreness arrive as the bill comes due.

skills.name: Biofeedback Field
skills.definition: With a sharp exhalation, the psion projects metabolic control outward, creating a pulsing field of resilience. Allies within feel invigorated—breath deepens, muscles flood with energy, and bodies resist poison and fatigue. Enemies feel the air turn heavy and hostile, each motion dragging against them. When the field collapses, allies sag with momentary drain—but the fight often tilts before that moment.

skills.name: Metabolic Dominion
skills.definition: The psion seizes control of all living metabolisms within reach, amplifying allies and suppressing enemies in one terrible act of will. Hearts thunder, muscles strain, and minds blaze in synCHAonized overdrive while foes choke on sluggish pulses. The battlefield becomes an echo of the psion’s internal rhythm—life itself beating to their cadence.

skills.name: Regenerative Metamorphosis
skills.definition: With immense focus, the psion rewrites flesh on the fly: wounds knit closed, organs reset, and even missing limbs can regrow in moments. Energy floods the target, pushing their biology into dangerous hypergrowth. While vitality surges and injuries vanish, the target risks collapsing under the weight of accelerated change.

skills.name: Genesis Renewal
skills.definition: The psion becomes a living fountain of biological will, rewriting the flesh of all within sight. Allies feel vitality surge through their bodies—organs reset, diseases unravel, and even the dying gasp as life returns. Lost limbs knit in blinding arcs of flesh-light, scars dissolve, and vitality blazes brighter than ever before. Enemies, however, feel their bodies betray them: poisons burn hotter, fatigue doubles, and their organs convulse as hostile metabolisms recoil from the psion’s dominance. The battlefield transforms into a domain where life itself bends to thought, reshaping every creature caught in the psion’s gaze. When the effect collapses, silence follows—the echo of countless heartbeats forced to march to a single rhythm. The psion stands drained, a husk of effort spent, their aura forever marked by the act.

skills.name: Telekinesis
skills.definition: Telekinesis allows the user to move or manipulate objects with their mind. Precision, strength, and subtlety are all possible, depending on discipline and control.

skills.name: Kinetic Push
skills.definition: With a flick of thought, the psion lashes out with invisible force, shoving a foe or object away as though struck by a giant unseen hand. Dust kicks up, robes billow, and weapons may be torn from grips as momentum carries the target backward. Often used to create space or break an enemy’s advance, the technique is a psionic staple.

skills.name: Force Grasp
skills.definition: The psion extends their mind like an invisible hand, seizing hold of an object within reach. Small items may float gently into their palm, while heavier ones strain against unseen fingers. Onlookers see the object wobble, rise, and drift unnaturally through the air. A useful technique both in battle and in delicate tasks.

skills.name: Deflect Projectile
skills.definition: By sharpening their focus in a split-second, the psion swats away an incoming arrow, bolt, or small thrown weapon with raw telekinetic force. The effect is subtle, a ripple in the air and a sudden shift in trajectory. To allies, it is lifesaving; to enemies, it is infuriating to see their sure strike turned aside.

skills.name: Force Wave
skills.definition: The psion compresses will into a snapping pressure front that bursts outward. Dust and grit whip into streamers as the wave forces bodies and gear back in a sudden lurch. Shields boom, boots skid, and formations buckle; it is space-making by brute intent. The effect is clean and nonlethal by default, but ruthless casters time it to push foes off ledges or into hazards. On a crowded field, it buys breathing room; in corridors, it clears choke points. Veterans learn to angle it, clipping only enemies.

skills.name: Telekinetic Pull
skills.definition: The caster hooks a target with invisible force and yanks. Cloaks snap forward, footing breaks, and weapons or smaller objects jerk toward the psion’s waiting hand. It is disruptive, personal, and profoundly tactical: drag archers into melee, pull stragglers off cover, or rip a wand back across the gap.
