Observers feel a momentary pressure in their sternum, like a sudden elevator drop. Used well, this breaks lines and opens finishers.

skills.name: Kinetic Armor
skills.definition: The psion compacts the air and micro-currents around a body into a responsive skin of force. Arrows slur sideways, blades skid, and hammers lose bite as the field soaks momentum before it reaches flesh. The armor flickers like heat haze and hums in the bones when struck. It won’t stop a siege hit, but it turns lethal blows into bruises and buys time to reposition. As the field is will-shaped, it is silent and gear-agnostic.

skills.name: Telekinetic Crush
skills.definition: The psion’s focus locks onto a foe, invisible bands of pressure snapping around them. The air hums with strain as armor creaks, bones groan, and movement grinds to a halt. Victims feel as though an iron giant’s fist has closed upon them, crushing both breath and hope. It is not instant death, but suffocation and pain until will falters.

skills.name: Force Barrier
skills.definition: The psion throws up a gleaming wall of compressed air, glasslike and invisible until struck. Arrows splinter, spells sputter, and charging warriors slam to a halt. Though fragile by grand-master standards, such barriers change the flow of a battle instantly—funneling foes, shielding allies, or sealing doorways with thought alone.

skills.name: Mass Levitation
skills.definition: The caster gestures broadly and the battlefield lifts. Loose weapons, rubble, and armored soldiers rise into the air like toys dangling from invisible strings. Gravity loosens its grip under the psion’s command, turning order to chaos. Allies can reposition midair while enemies flail helplessly, held in a pressurized pocket of skewed motion.

skills.name: Telekinetic Maelstrom
skills.definition: With a roar of invisible pressure, the psion tears loose the battlefield itself. Rocks, weapons, and even bodies spiral upward in a violent storm of debris. Shards and rubble lash out randomly, battering all caught within the zone. Escape is possible, but movement feels like pushing through a hurricane of steel and stone. The air howls and twists as will-made currents shred formations and scatter courage.

skills.name: Titan's Grasp
skills.definition: An enormous, spectral hand of force manifests, vast enough to seize siege engines or crush multiple foes together. Its fingers close with grinding inevitability, bones creaking and armor squealing as if under a mountain’s weight. Few can escape once caught; those who do carry the ache of pressure for days.

skills.name: Cataclysmic Convergence
skills.definition: The psion unleashes layered fields of telekinetic domination. First, an all-encompassing gravity well seizes everything in range, pulling bodies and rubble inward. Simultaneously, a crushing force field locks targets in place, bones grinding and armor buckling. Finally, the zone itself twists with distorted vectors—arrows veer, stones float, and movement becomes impossible. The battlefield becomes a collapsing sphere of pressure and distortion, a storm of invisible hands dragging the world down.

skills.name: Telepathy
skills.definition: Telepathy opens pathways between minds. It enables silent communication, emotional sensing, or deeper mental exploration. Thoughts become language, and secrets less secure.

skills.name: Mind Whisper
skills.definition: A gossamer thread of intent stretches from the caster’s mind to the target, carrying words without sound and meaning without lips. The target hears a clear inner voice matching the caster’s tone, inflection, and cadence. The link conveys message content and emotional tone but does not read or receive thoughts in return. It works through noise, fog, and darkness so long as the target is within range. The effect is subtle to observers; only the target perceives the mental whisper. The caster must maintain light focus to keep the thread coherent for the brief window.

skills.name: Surface Scan
skills.definition: The caster brushes the surface of a target’s thoughts like fingertips skimming water, catching ripples of what is foremost in mind. FraG.O.Dents of inner monologue, flashes of intention, and the emotional “color” of the moment rise briefly into clarity. Lies become easier to sense by noticing discord between thought and speech. The contact is quick and surgical, leaving no lasting mark beyond a momentary chill or pressure behind the eyes. The scan does not pierce stored memory, only active thoughts.

skills.name: Emotional Nudge
skills.definition: With a delicate mental push, the caster stirs the target’s emotions. A spark of courage, a whisper of fear, or a sudden calm overtakes them briefly. The effect is fleeting but can turn hesitation into action or cool tempers in tense moments. It tilts choices without rewriting identity. Subtle practitioners pair it with timing to amplify its impact. Observers rarely notice more than a shift in posture or breath.

skills.name: Silent Chorus
skills.definition: The caster threads a temporary mental channel between multiple allies, allowing silent communication without words. Each participant hears the others’ thoughts as whispered impressions, sharpened with intent and emotion. The network is short-lived but invaluable for tactical coordination, ambushes, or negotiations where speaking would betray intent. Thoughts broadcast are only those deliberately sent, not private musings, though untrained minds may slip.

skills.name: Truth Sense
skills.definition: By aligning perception to mental dissonance, the caster detects when words diverge from thought. The target’s speech seems shadowed by an echo of true intent, allowing the telepath to sense lies, omissions, or concealed motives. The effect does not reveal exact truths, only the presence of deceit or distortion. For interrogators and mediators, it is a razor-edge tool that cuts through manipulation without exposing full memory.

skills.name: Mental Suggestion
skills.definition: The caster plants a subtle thought inside the target’s mind — a whisper that feels like their own idea. The suggestion cannot override core beliefs, but it can sway decisions, urge hesitation, or nudge behavior in the moment. The effect is fragile: a strong will or conflicting motive may shrug it off, but when it lands, it shapes choice without force.

skills.name: Memory Weave
skills.definition: The caster threads into the target’s memory, surfacing vivid recollections while blurring or stitching details together. The telepath can reinforce a moment to clarity, edit minor details, or soften painful recollections. Though incapable of wholesale rewriting at this tier, it allows targeted tampering—an interrogator’s truth extraction or a healer’s trauma softening. Victims often emerge uncertain whether their memory was altered.

skills.name: Psychic Domination
skills.definition: The caster clamps a mental vise on the target’s executive will, binding their next choice to a single, simple command. It does not erase identity or grant freeform puppeteering; it forces compliance for the moment, narrowing options to the directive given. The pressure feels like iron bands around thought—obedience seems inevitable, resistance like struggling underwater.

skills.name: Telepathic Storm
skills.definition: The caster detonates a field of psychic static—intrusive thoughts, discordant echoes, and emotional spikes—across the battlefield. Minds reel; coordination falters; actions slip through shaking hands. The storm presses invisibly on every skull within the radius, leaving even veterans blinking and off-balance.

skills.name: Mindquake
skills.definition: The caster detonates a shockwave of psionic force across every mind within reach. The psychic tremor rattles thought itself, causing seizures of memory, speech collapse, and disorientation. Combatants drop weapons, falter mid-strike, or clutch their heads as the quake reverberates. The air seems silent, yet inside every skull a roaring fracture splits reason apart.

skills.name: Crown of Thorns
skills.definition: The caster forges a burning mental crown of invasive thought upon a single target’s psyche. The victim feels every idea pierce like barbs, their will tethered by pain and compulsion. Each step, each decision comes with agony unless aligned with the caster’s implanted directive. Allies see the target’s eyes glow with strain as their own mind screams rebellion.

skills.name: Hive Dominion
skills.definition: The caster imposes a vast psionic lattice across every mind in sight, bending individuals into a temporary hive under their dominion. Thoughts become strands in a web with the caster as the central node. Victims lose the ability to act independently; their wills synCHAonize to the caster’s commands. The lattice bleeds psychic pressure, inflicting pain and fatigue while drawing life energy into the caster to sustain the construct. Independent thought is not only bound but destroyed, rewritten into chorus. Allies feel their choices blunted, enemies collapse into forced unity, and the battlefield trembles as hundreds of lives march to one alien cadence. The effect strains even the caster, blood seeping from eyes and ears as their mind stretches to contain the chorus. Once released, victims often remember fraG.O.Dents as if their bodies were marionettes, their voices stolen by another.

skills.name: Oneirics
skills.definition: Oneirics reaches into dreams and the liminal edge of sleep. It enables inducing or navigating dreams and extracting truths from them—the imagined shaping the waking.

skills.name: Somnolent Touch
skills.definition: With a brush of the hand, the caster induces a sudden wave of drowsiness. The target’s eyelids grow heavy, thoughts blur, and their movements falter as if slipping toward sleep. This does not render them unconscious, but it drags their reflexes into treacle for a heartbeat of battle.

skills.name: Whisper of Night
skills.definition: A faint murmur seeps into the target’s mind like a drifting dream fragment. The whisper distracts, conjuring vague imagery of shadowy figures or forgotten voices. The illusions are subtle and fleeting, just enough to pull focus at the crucial moment.

skills.name: Lucid Spark
skills.definition: The caster sharpens an ally’s awareness as though waking them into a lucid dream. Senses flare, reaction times tighten, and distracting noise falls away. For a brief window, they move as if the field were a scene they’ve chosen to navigate.

skills.name: Dream Snare
skills.definition: The caster weaves a psychic tether into the target’s mind, anchoring them in a tight loop of repeating moments. For a heartbeat of battle the victim can’t quite step cleanly into waking action—their limbs feel caught in molasses, focus sliding as phantom echoes overlay reality.

skills.name: Night Terror
skills.definition: The caster thrusts a shard of nightmare into the target’s senses: a rush of shadow, falling corridors, or a remembered scream. Though illusory, the terror knots muscles and scatters attention, turning precision into doubt for the span of a clash.

skills.name: Shared Dream
skills.definition: The caster braids two minds into a flickering, shared vignette—just long enough for an ally to read the flow together while an enemy stumbles over borrowed thoughts. The moment passes like a blink, but the alignment (and dissonance) lingers through the step.

skills.name: Dream Bastion
skills.definition: The caster manifests a fortified dreamscape around themselves and chosen allies, shielding them from hostile intrusion. Within the Bastion, thoughts feel sharper and illusions falter. Enemies attempting to pierce or manipulate minds find their efforts dulled.

skills.name: Nightmare Sculpt
skills.definition: The caster crafts a vivid nightmare illusion, draping an area in warped, surreal imagery—walls melting, shadows whispering, ground fracturing beneath false steps. Those inside struggle to distinguish truth, risking panic or hesitation.

skills.name: Dreamwalk
skills.definition: The caster tears open the veil of sleep, stepping partially into another’s dream and dragging them along. For the duration, both caster and target exist in a liminal state—half waking, half dreaming—able to strike across both realms but vulnerable to collapse if concentration falters.

skills.name: Cathedral of Sleep
skills.definition: A cathedral of silent bells and moonlit aisles descends over the battlefield, built from the shared architecture of sleeping minds. Pillars rise and bend the angles of space as motes of dream-dust hush footfalls and soften the edges of thought. Choirless echoes hum at the threshold of hearing, turning commands into muffled intentions. Within the nave, vision doubles and then blurs, as though every motion leaves a drowsy afterimage. The air itself thickens like velvet, inviting stillness. Those who resist the hush feel the weight of ritual time pressing down on their muscles. Those who fail are caught in a loop of entering and re-entering the same second, stunned as the bells never quite ring. At the spell’s heart, the caster’s focus serves as the high altar that anchors the entire structure. Should that focus slip, the pews splinter and the dream collapses back into raw night. Even the wakeful admit: for a moment, the world knelt.

skills.name: Labyrinth of the Sleeper
skills.definition: The caster unfolds a cubic maze of dream-corridors over the field, every turn repeating into itself like a thought you cannot quite finish. Floors seem to tilt a few degrees off possible, doors open back into the same room, and distances breathe in and out. Footfalls are swallowed; shouts arrive a measure too late. Enemies feel their intention drift sideways as the maze leans them away from exits. The illusion wrings certainty out of sightlines while the space itself presses like gentle water against every motion. Those who fail to assert their will find their steps locking in place, as if the next square refuses to exist until they truly choose it. The maze is generous to none, but the caster holds the key and knows where the walls are thinnest. With time, even steel learns to yawn. When it fades, the world feels painfully sharp for a beat, like waking too fast. The map never existed—except that you were on it.

skills.name: Eternal Dreamfall
skills.definition: The caster collapses the border between waking and dreaming across an entire battlefield. The sky ripples into shifting auroras of memory, ground dissolves into corridors of half-remembered dreams, and every creature is pulled into a shared tapestry of illusion and truth. Allies move with uncanny foresight, guided by echoes of futures that have not yet happened. Enemies falter as their wills fragment between countless dream-selves, their movements slowed, their bodies drained, and their minds at risk of being lost forever in infinite recursion. Only the caster’s focus anchors the dreamfall; if broken, the illusion collapses violently, leaving both friend and foe stunned by the aftershock.

skills.name: Umbrakinesis
skills.definition: Umbrakinesis commands shadow and absence of light. It can dim, cloak, or harden darkness into tools and barriers—the unseen becoming your instrument.

skills.name: Shadow Grasp
skills.definition: Thin tendrils of darkness extend from the caster’s hand, latching onto a foe with ephemeral force. The shadows cling like wet cloth and tug at the target’s limbs, making movement briefly difficult.

skills.name: Umbral Cloak
skills.definition: A haze of shadow wraps around the caster, softening their outline and dimming their presence. Edges blur into surrounding gloom, making them harder to target during the fleeting veil.

skills.name: Flicker Step
skills.definition: The caster melts into a nearby patch of shadow and reappears up to a few paces away with a ripple of darkness. It is a quick, limited step that relies on connected shadows.

skills.name: Shadow Snare
skills.definition: From the ground, shadowy tendrils lash out in a spreading fan, tangling around nearby foes. The bindings pull taut; movement falters as the dark grips and drags at ankles and wrists.

skills.name: Cloak of Midnight
skills.definition: An enveloping mantle of shadow spreads over multiple allies, dimming their outlines and swallowing footfalls. Enemies struggle to land clean hits as the night itself seems to slide across the veiled forms.

skills.name: Umbral Step
skills.definition: The caster and a chosen ally slip into connected shadows and reappear a short distance away, silhouettes shredding into smoke before reforming. It’s a swift, practiced tandem step through the dark.

skills.name: Eclipse Shroud
skills.definition: The caster draws shadows from every corner, weaving them into a dome of suffocating gloom. Within, allies move unseen while enemies falter, their strikes wild and senses dulled. The shroud blurs vision, muffles sound, and weighs on the will.

skills.name: Nightfang Manifest
skills.definition: The caster rips a fragment of shadow loose, shaping it into a snarling beast of teeth and smoke. The phantom lunges at foes, biting with ephemeral jaws and tearing through courage as much as flesh. It is a temporary, vicious summon.

skills.name: Shadow Maw
skills.definition: An immense rift opens beneath the foe, jaws of darkness snapping upward to drag them down. The maw clamps with spectral teeth and shadowstuff, pinning the victim in place while gnawing away both body and resolve.

skills.name: Shadow Cataclysm
skills.definition: Shadows erupt in a devastating surge, forming a massive storm of claws, tendrils, and shrieking void-winds. Within the storm, enemies are clawed, blinded, and dragged by ephemeral forces while allies risk being caught in the chaos. The battlefield becomes a writhing field of darkness where direction and courage collapse.

skills.name: Eternal Eclipse
skills.definition: The caster blots out light itself across the battlefield, creating a dome where vision, sound, and even hope falter. Enemies stumble, allies vanish into concealment, and only those attuned to shadow can move with confidence. The eclipse feels like the sky itself collapsing inward, crushing will as much as sense.

skills.name: Oblivion Eclipse
skills.definition: The caster pulls all shadows across the battlefield into a single cosmic convergence. A vast dome of living night descends, swallowing light, sound, and matter into suffocating nullity. Within, foes are crushed by shadow-tendrils, drained of vitality, and risk being erased entirely. Allies move unseen but must resist the same consuming dark. The eclipse does not simply obscure—it threatens to overwrite existence itself.

skills.name: Anger
skills.definition: You channel the raw fury buried in the human voice—vibrations that shatter calm and ignite conflict. This resonance stirs adrenaline, provokes confrontation, and can push allies or enemies to reckless extremes.

skills.name: Spark of Wrath
skills.definition: The bard’s sharp note or cutting phrase ignites a target’s inner fury. Muscles tense, resolve flares, and each strike carries a little more weight. Though simple, it is the first step of turning emotion into a weapon.

skills.name: Heckle
skills.definition: The bard unleashes a biting insult or mocking chord that rattles an opponent. The target’s anger spikes but turns unfocused, leaving them less precise in the moment.

skills.name: Ember of Fury
skills.definition: The bard strikes a resonant war-beat that quickens pulses among nearby allies. Feet tap, breath quickens, and initiative sharpens as the ember of fury spreads.

skills.name: Stoke the Line
skills.definition: The bard hammers out a driving battle-chant that swells into a shared fury. The sound tightens grips, sets teeth, and turns hesitation into hot resolve. Within the circle of sound, allies’ strikes grow surer and land harder, their cadence syncing to the aggressive rhythm. The aura doesn’t overwhelm judgment; it focuses anger into clean, deliberate action. Shields bunch together, spears tilt forward, and a red shimmer pulses at the edge of vision. The chant is infectious but controlled, a forge that tempers rather than shatters. Even the timid find a spark—enough to push, enough to hold. As the round crests, the heat recedes, but the echo lingers in memory and stance. Used well, it flips a stalemate into a push. Used poorly, it can bait allies into overextending.

skills.name: Incendiary Rebuke
skills.definition: The bard lashes a foe with a scorching phrase—anger spikes, but it scatters their focus. The target bristles, grip tightens, and precision bleeds away. The insult is crafted to hook pride, not panic, so it doesn’t freeze them—it just makes their next choices worse. Blades come in heavy, not careful; spells fling fast, not true. The sound hangs in the air like heat off stone, then snaps shut around the target’s aura. Allies feel the tension break; opportunity opens. The bard watches for the stumble—this is the beat to press. With discipline, the party converts frustration into advantage. With carelessness, the foe’s rage may still explode in a lucky swing.

skills.name: Sweeping Roar
skills.definition: The bard erupts with a wall of sound that hits like a shoulder-check from the front line. The wave doesn’t just frighten—it weaponizes anger into motion. Shields jolt, feet skid, and those unready crash to the floor as the roar plows through the rank. It’s a clean blast: no blood, just force, dust, and pride. Veterans brace and hold; the unsteady go tumbling. The air ripples crimson for a heartbeat then clears, leaving openings where order just was. Used to break a shield wall or to create breathing room, it is the sound of momentum changing hands. Overuse can leave the bard winded and predictable; timed right, it’s a fight-winner.

skills.name: Battle Hymn of Fury
skills.definition: The bard unleashes a pounding anthem that spreads like fire across the battlefield. Allies seize the rhythm, weapons crash harder, and hesitation burns away. The song does not merely embolden—it fuses rage into a collective tide. The chant spreads through stomps, claps, or drumbeats, saturating the area in martial fury.

skills.name: Vexing Aria
skills.definition: A jagged performance—half shriek, half string-cutting chord—splinters the composure of foes. Rage surges uncontrolled, breaking precision and timing. The aria does not silence them; it drives them into clumsy overreach.

skills.name: Ragequake
skills.definition: The bard roars, striking the ground or stomping a rhythm that bursts outward in a shockwave of fury. The quake doesn’t just shake the earth—it shakes composure. Those caught stumble, collapse, or are driven back by the sheer ferocity resonating from the bard.

skills.name: Wrath Unleashed
skills.definition: The bard bellows a resonant fury that floods allies with disciplined wrath while shaking enemy composure. Within the crimson sphere, friends strike harder, faster, and truer; foes grit teeth and overreach as precision frays. The chant is a forge’s roar, turning a scattered melee into a rolling advance.

skills.name: Seismic Fury
skills.definition: The bard slams rhythm into the earth; a wrathquake blasts outward, hurling bodies, cracking lines, and leaving a churning zone of hostile footing. Dust blooms red in torchlight, stones jitter, and even veterans feel their stance go uncertain as anger hums beneath their boots.

skills.name: Rage Dominion
skills.definition: The bard crowns the battlefield with a dominion of wrath. A blood-red wave surges outward, saturating the air with heat, grit, and pounding drum-beat thunder. Within the sphere, allies feel a disciplined surge—fury sharpened to precision—while enemies lose control, their rage devolving into sloppy violence. Weapons strike truer, blows land heavier, and timing sharpens under the bard’s rhythm. The ground trembles, dust hangs in the air, and every heartbeat falls in sync with the furious chorus. A second pulse follows: a crushing command that staggers foes, dropping some to knees while freezing others mid-motion. The zone itself warps—space thickens, movement drags, and occasional stutters in time cause actions to falter. For three rounds the battlefield belongs to the bard; even when the chorus fades, echoes haunt both steel and spirit.

skills.name: Fear
skills.definition: A performance laced with dread, causing the unseen to feel closer and the known to feel unsafe. This resonance fractures bravery and distorts judG.O.Dent—summoning silence or panic in its wake.

skills.name: Echo of Unease
skills.definition: The bard hums a low, wavering note that seems to echo in the listener’s bones. An invisible weight presses on the mind, magnifying every shadow and whisper until hesitation takes hold. Though subtle, the dread can tilt the balance in tense moments.

skills.name: Shuddering Chord
skills.definition: A sharp, discordant note rips through the air, sending a jolt of panic through the target’s nerves. The effect is immediate: a stumble and a hard fall as instinct overrides poise. The terror fades quickly, but the opening it creates can be decisive.

skills.name: Lingering Paranoia
skills.definition: The bard’s cadence crawls under the skin, tightening breath and quickening glances. Every step feels watched; confidence erodes in a heartbeat-long shiver that throws timing off.

skills.name: Phantom Footfalls
skills.definition: A hushed performance sends ghostly steps echoing just behind the target, always a half-pace late. Their pulse races, their grip slips, and every glance back finds only empty air. Panic disrupts poise, forcing costly mistakes.

skills.name: Crushing Dread
skills.definition: The bard’s dirge drags like a weight on the chest. Muscles weaken, knees tremble, and the heart feels heavy as if the air itself resists motion. The victim staggers under a burden no one else can see.

skills.name: Terror Pulse
skills.definition: A jagged chord bursts outward, splintering courage in all who hear it. For a heartbeat the world narrows to pounding blood and the urge to flee. Most shake it off quickly, but that heartbeat is all the bard needs.

skills.name: Chains of Dread
skills.definition: The bard’s chords twist into spectral rattling, summoning phantom chains that lash around those nearby. The chains are not real—yet the weight of terror binds flesh and mind alike. Victims struggle to move, convinced their limbs are shackled.

skills.name: Harrowing Dirge
skills.definition: The bard unleashes a low, continuous dirge that seeps into the target’s soul. Breath grows shallow, limbs weaken, and every instinct screams to retreat. The song erodes strength, will, and timing all at once until only dread remains.

skills.name: Phantasmal Host
skills.definition: The bard crescendos into a horrific chord that tears at the veil of imagination. Around the bard, enemies see spectral figures closing in—wraithlike soldiers of nightmare. Though unreal, their terror has weight: foes stumble, falter, and strike poorly.

skills.name: Cacophony of Nightmares
skills.definition: The bard unleashes a hideous chorus of layered screams, whispers, and sobs that erupt in the minds of all nearby. Each victim sees their deepest fear reflected in phantom form, while their bodies lock under the imagined assault and the air itself seems to press in.

skills.name: Grasp of the Pale Host
skills.definition: From the bard’s performance surge spectral arms—pale, eyeless figures that claw and drag at those nearby. Though unreal, the terror binds as if real while the space around the victims thickens, dragging at their steps and breath.

skills.name: Nightmare Dominion
skills.definition: The bard unleashes the ultimate chord of terror, collapsing the battlefield into a waking nightmare. The air curdles into shadow, phantasms swarm, and time itself drags beneath the weight of collective dread. Every enemy sees their worst fear stalking them, while allies feel their courage tested by the same oppressive vision. Movement halts, resolve breaks, and the world becomes a prison of fear.

skills.name: Joy
skills.definition: Through brightness of tone and uplifting cadence, you stir laughter, courage, and spontaneous connection. This resonance cuts through despair and can lift entire groups into sudden unity or euphoria.

skills.name: Spark of Laughter
skills.definition: With a playful note or witty flourish, the bard sparks laughter in their target. Shoulders lighten, breath eases, and the weight of battle briefly lifts. Though fleeting, the joy kindles resilience, granting just enough strength to stand firm.

skills.name: Gentle Reprieve
skills.definition: The bard hums a soft phrase, a balm of sound that soothes an ally’s weariness. Tension unwinds, and the heart steadies. The joy does not heal wounds, but it restores spirit, easing pain’s edge for a moment of reprieve.

skills.name: Joyful Guard
skills.definition: The bard strums a playful trill or claps in rhythm, weaving joy into a protective veil. For a fleeting moment, laughter seems to hang in the air like a shield, catching blows before they land. Allies feel their courage reinforced, knowing even harm bends beneath the weight of happiness.

skills.name: Chorus of Delight
skills.definition: With a rising refrain, the bard’s music spills outward, harmonizing hearts in a radiant chord. Allies feel their movements sync as if part of a single rhythm. The melody uplifts, pushing hesitation aside with laughter and confidence.

skills.name: Festival Spark
skills.definition: The bard strikes up a tune that feels like the opening of a festival—drums, strings, or clapping that ignite a spark of celebration. Even in dire battle, spirits flare. Allies grin, cheer, and rally, fighting harder as if the world itself applauds them.

skills.name: Echo of Resilience
skills.definition: The bard’s note reverberates in the soul like a remembered triumph. Pain dulls, breath steadies, and allies feel courage swell. This is not raw healing—it is defiance in sound, a will to endure that pain cannot silence.

skills.name: Radiant Harmony
skills.definition: The bard releases a powerful harmony that unites allies in radiant joy, their movements sharpened and their spirits lifted in perfect sync.

skills.name: Carnival of Courage
skills.definition: The bard conjures the spirit of a grand festival, where music and courage drive away despair. Allies fight as if emboldened by the cheers of an unseen crowd.

skills.name: Ballad of Shared Triumph
skills.definition: A triumphant ballad heals several allies at once, sharing the vitality of joy across the battlefield.

skills.name: Symphony of Exultation
skills.definition: A sweeping, exultant performance floods the field with relentless joy—precision, speed, force, and poise moving as one—and even dread struggles to take hold.

skills.name: Revelry Unending
skills.definition: A tidal festival of sound and motion turns the ground itself into a jubilant arena—attacks hit harder, armor holds truer, wounds mend, and the very space invites dancers to flow.

skills.name: Eternal Jubilee
skills.definition: The bard unleashes the supreme festival of existence, a resonance so vast that joy itself becomes the battlefield’s heartbeat. Allies surge with unity, wounds close in radiant laughter, despair shatters, and even foes stagger in awe as sorrow cannot hold its shape.

skills.name: Love
skills.definition: A gentle but powerful resonance that opens hearts and builds trust. Whether kindling connection or softening hardened spirits, the resonance of love works through empathy more than force.

skills.name: Heart’s Whisper
skills.definition: With a gentle chord or whispered lyric, the bard reaches into a single ally’s heart. A warmth blossoms in their chest, steadying breath and calming fear. Though no great wound is mended, the target feels supported, their resolve no longer wavering. This reverberation is often used before battle or in moments of quiet grief.

skills.name: Bond of Trust
skills.definition: The bard weaves a short refrain of loyalty, binding allies in trust. Two companions feel their confidence grow as they act in harmony, encouraged by the resonance. Movements synCHAonize subtly, attacks land more decisively, and they find comfort in shared purpose.

skills.name: Unveiled Affection
skills.definition: The bard strikes a simple but resonant chord that draws forth hidden feelings. A single target’s emotional guard weakens, revealing hints of what they truly hold within. Allies may sense hesitation, affection, or even suppressed devotion. While not harmful, it can be a potent tool for connection or uncovering truth.

skills.name: Harmony’s Embrace
skills.definition: The bard strums a rising chord that enfolds allies within reach. Those touched by the resonance feel fear fade and their courage ignite. Their steps fall in rhythm with one another, striking more surely and moving with confidence born of unity.

skills.name: Mending Serenade
skills.definition: A gentle melody spreads like a warm tide, softening pain and stitching wounds of both body and heart. The bard’s song fills the air with reassurance, easing the strain of battle and giving allies the strength to continue.

skills.name: Revelation of Hearts
skills.definition: Striking a clear, resonant note, the bard exposes the truths that linger beneath words. Those caught in the tone find their pretenses slipping, unable to fully hide their emotions or intent. The spell is not cruel — it reveals only surface feelings — but it can turn suspicion to trust or expose subtle deception.

skills.name: Symphony of Devotion
skills.definition: The bard weaves a layered harmony that fills allies with determination. Each note bolsters their strikes and movements, uniting them in one rhythm of purpose. The song drowns out hesitation, lifting the group into a shared momentum.

skills.name: Healing Chorus
skills.definition: With a sweeping melody, the bard calls forth a wave of restorative sound. The resonance pours over allies like warm light, mending flesh and spirit alike. Wounds knit partially closed, while hearts steady with courage to continue.

skills.name: Revelation Aria
skills.definition: The bard releases a resonant aria that pierces through deception. Within its reach, lies falter, hidden emotions surface, and facades collapse. Allies see one another with raw clarity, while foes cannot conceal their intent.

skills.name: Eternal Vow
skills.definition: The bard sings a vow so profound that bonds between allies become unbreakable. Each ally feels their life tied to the others—when one falters, another steadies them. Wounds are shared, courage is pooled, and betrayal becomes nearly impossible under the sacred harmony. Enemies attempting to divide them find their influence broken.

skills.name: Aria of Sacred Union
skills.definition: A sweeping aria binds allies’ hearts in radiant trust while exposing enemies’ malice. Allies become harder to break apart, gaining initiative and resilience, while foes within are forced into honesty—deception or betrayal withers in their throats.

skills.name: Concordance of One Heart
skills.definition: The bard exhales a world-filling chord that binds every soul within sight into a single, luminous accord. The sound is not tender—it is sovereign: a living vow that stitches allies together and stills hostile intent. Armor hums, breath steadies, and movements synCHAonize as if guided by one unseen conductor. Wounds soften as strength passes between comrades, and each strike finds purpose born of trust. Masks crack; even foes feel their motives laid bare beneath the current of undeniable empathy. The air thickens like warm glass as space itself bows, slowing hostile motion and holding violence at bay. Every heartbeat inside the field becomes a drum in the same song, and the song refuses to break. To challenge it is to stand against the simple truth that love, shared, is stronger than fear, alone. When the last overtone fades, those who stood together carry its resonance in their bones.

skills.name: Sorrow
skills.definition: A haunting melody that calls forth memory, loss, and longing. This resonance reveals hidden pain, stirs reflection, or bonds strangers through shared grief. It is the silence between notes that carries the deepest power.

skills.name: Tearful Lament
skills.definition: The bard’s voice cracks with aching sorrow, tugging at the heartstrings of a chosen listener. A weight settles on their chest as tears well unbidden, clouding judgment and dulling their resolve for a fleeting moment. While it does no lasting harm, the lament forces them into a brief wave of grief, blurring their focus.

skills.name: Echo of Mourning
skills.definition: A soft, haunting phrase ripples through the air, settling into the heart of an ally or foe. For allies, it provides a strange catharsis—tears shed ease a burden they did not know they carried. For foes, the same tears blur their vision and slow their strikes. In both cases, the echo leaves silence in its wake, a hollow reminder of grief shared.

skills.name: Steal the Smile
skills.definition: With a dissonant chord or mocking line, the bard strips the warmth from their foe’s heart. The target feels their spirit sag, movements dulled by the absence of joy. A cruel twist of resonance that leaves one empty-handed in the fight.

skills.name: Dirge of Weariness
skills.definition: A mournful chant pours from the bard, heavy as chains. All within its reach feel the creeping weight of despair, their arms sagging and their steps faltering. Even the keenest blades seem dulled under the dirge’s pull, leaving combatants weary and hesitant. Though brief, the dirge is a chilling taste of hopelessness.

skills.name: Lamenting Shackles
skills.definition: The bard’s sorrow-laden tones solidify as spectral chains of grief that coil around a target. The chains drag at heart and limb alike, sapping strength while binding the will to act. Struggling against them only deepens the sense of futility.

skills.name: Wail of the Forsaken
skills.definition: The bard unleashes a piercing cry of grief that echoes like a battlefield dirge. The sound rattles weapons in hands, pulls at the heart, and brings soldiers to their knees with despair. Those caught in the sound suffer blurred vision, faltering aim, and a crawling weakness in their limbs.

skills.name: Chains of Melancholy
skills.definition: A haunting song manifests as spectral chains that lash out to bind multiple foes at once. Each victim feels both physical restraint and the weight of despair pressing down on their hearts. Breaking free requires not just strength, but the will to overcome sorrow itself.

skills.name: Dirge of the Hollow Heart
skills.definition: The bard sings a hollow hymn that gnaws at the soul. Within its reach, enemies are not just weakened — they begin to question the worth of fighting at all. Weapons sag, eyes lose fire, and every strike feels meaningless. The dirge turns battle into a scene of futility.

skills.name: Elegy of Despair
skills.definition: The bard’s voice becomes a death knell, a dirge so heavy that even the strongest falter beneath it. A black pall falls across the battlefield as the song resonates, draining resolve and withering strength. Warriors who once fought with fire in their eyes now stumble, blades feeling like lead. The elegy does not kill—it convinces soldiers that they are already defeated.

skills.name: Funeral Chains
skills.definition: The bard’s sorrow becomes a storm of spectral chains wrought from grief itself. They lash outward in all directions, binding dozens at once. Each chain drags at flesh and spirit alike, slowing steps, sapping willpower, and fixing enemies in place. Even those who break free feel the rattle of the shackles in their bones, haunted by the echo of despair.

skills.name: Cataclysm of Grief
skills.definition: The bard releases the ultimate dirge, a grief so profound it becomes a world-shaking force. The sky dims, the air trembles, and all within miles feel the weight of endless funerals pressing upon their soul. Enemies collapse in despair, allies weep uncontrollably, and the battlefield becomes a monument of sorrow. Blades slip from hands, knees buckle, and even the earth itself seems to mourn under the strain of the song. The cataclysm does not just hinder—it overwrites the mood of the world for minutes after the sound fades.

skills.name: Harmonic
skills.definition: The purest form of balanced resonance—neither emotion nor intent, just raw vibrational symmetry. Harmonic resonance stabilizes or amplifies other performances, and can retune spaces or spirits to a higher state.

skills.name: Resonant Shiver
skills.definition: A sharp note makes a fragile object quiver and shake, often cracking or breaking outright. To sturdier items, the vibration is little more than a rattle, but the sympathetic sound can echo across a room.

skills.name: Quantum Hum
skills.definition: The bard hums a low tone that ripples across the floor. Those nearby feel balance falter as vibrations disorient their steps. No harm is done, but accuracy suffers briefly.

skills.name: Tuning Note
skills.definition: The bard strikes a pure note into a nearby ally, aligning their inner rhythm. Breathing steadies and strength refocuses, mending the body slightly and boosting performance.

skills.name: Harmonic Lattice
skills.definition: The bard steps into stance and releases a measured chord that knits the air into a pressurized field. Dust eddies draw geometric patterns as the pressure gradient firms into a palpable zone. Within the boundary, footsteps feel heavy, leaps shorten, and thrown objects arc low as if the world turned thicker. The sound isn’t loud so much as exact—the kind of tone you feel in your teeth and knees. Armor plates creak; cloaks drag; arrows veer a hair off course. The lattice doesn’t crush or harm by itself; it simply reshapes movement, forcing combatants to commit to each stride. Tactical lines bend around the zone, giving the bard’s allies room to reposition and punish overextensions. Observers note a faint shimmer, like heat-haze with a grid hiding in it. On release, the air snaps back to normal, leaving the slightest taste of copper on the tongue. Veterans learn to ride the rhythm; fools try to power through and lose tempo.

skills.name: Dissonant Disarm
skills.definition: A clipped, discordant click shivers through steel and sinew at once. The bard aims the beat at a held weapon, making it buzz against the wielder’s grip like a hornet. Fingers reflexively open or the haft twists just enough to pitch free. The sound is small but humiliating, like being out of tune in front of a crowd. Sparks may flicker along the guard as micro-vibrations misalign skin and metal. Shields thump against arms; knives skitter across the floor; bows dip off target. The opening is brief but decisive, resetting the tempo of the exchange. Those ready for it can try to clamp down, but the beat is faster than the thought to resist. The resonance fades without lingering harm—only pride stings. Wise fighters learn to listen for that click and adjust their grip.

skills.name: Chord of Coherence
skills.definition: The bard sustains a pure, centered tone that gathers listeners onto the same beat. Breaths synCHAonize, feet plant with intention, and eyes sharpen as micro-tremors clarify posture. Subtle overtones sweep the area, teasing out hidden currents—footfalls behind a curtain, a crosswind through an arrow-slit, a hinge that’s been lifted and set back. Allies feel a nudge of confidence as their micro-timing snaps into alignment. The space itself seems tidier, like clutter getting pushed to the edges of awareness. For a heartbeat, teamwork becomes obvious: who should press, who should anchor, who should feint. The tone never overwhelms speech; it nestles under it, a spine of sound. When it stops, the world feels fractionally duller but more understandable. The memory of the chord lingers as a cue to act cleanly.

skills.name: Resonant Shatter
skills.definition: The bard singles out a weapon, shield, or object and strikes its resonant frequency. As the sound locks in, the vibration spreads outward, shaking nearby items in sympathy. The chosen target suffers most, while objects in reach quiver and splinter in lesser fashion. Allies hear the glass-like chime echo out, already knowing which cover is unsafe.

skills.name: Harmonic Shielding
skills.definition: The bard anchors protective vibrations onto one ally, wrapping them in a shimmering lattice of sound. From that ally, the harmonics radiate outward, damping strikes against their companions as well. Arrows bend slightly, weapons lose edge, and heavy blows arrive dulled. The lattice holds as long as the bard sustains the tone.

skills.name: Quantum Chorus
skills.definition: The bard seizes the tempo of battle by locking onto a foe’s rhythm. The chosen enemy feels their movements stagger and slip off-beat. The disruption spreads in sympathetic echoes, slowing their nearby allies, while the bard’s own companions feel a counter-pulse quickening their step. The chorus multiplies—out of one target, a battlefield ripple.

skills.name: Fracture of the Infinite
skills.definition: The bard releases a note that should not exist, a pitch threaded between harmonics of the cosmos. The chosen object or creature becomes the anchor, and vibrations ripple outward in impossible waves. Nearby matter resonates, not breaking immediately but phasing through unstable states. Fragile structures crumble, weapons bend mid-swing, and even the air warps with translucent fractures. Those within the zone feel as though the world itself has been detuned, their bones vibrating in sympathy with the song. The effect is devastating but short-lived, as the universe recoils from the imposed resonance. When silence falls, the battlefield feels unnervingly hollow, as though part of reality was torn out of tune.

skills.name: Symphony of Alignment
skills.definition: The bard summons a chorus of layered harmonics that bend not just sound, but probability itself. Allies in the field find their strikes land with eerie inevitability, while enemies falter as if forced out of rhythm with reality. The vibrations hum within bone and blood, aligning intention to outcome for a fleeting moment. The battlefield becomes a stage of inevitability: arrows curve mid-flight, swords slip perfectly into gaps, and shields lift just in time. Yet the price of such alignment is weight—the song presses heavily on all minds, threatening to collapse focus into a single, suffocating tone. When it ends, combatants stagger as though waking from a dream, remembering the inevitability of every motion.

skills.name: Quantum Convergence
skills.definition: The bard strikes a note so pure it resonates with the lattice of reality itself. The chosen foe becomes the fulcrum of impossible vibration—every particle tugged between harmony and dissonance. From that anchor, concentric pulses radiate, drawing allies and enemies alike into the quantum storm. Blades bend mid-swing, glass melts without heat, and even time skips in fractured beats. Allies feel fleeting surges of clarity as their movements align with the resonance, while enemies stagger, their forms half-phased, voices distorted into echoes of themselves. The battlefield is transformed into a hall of mirrors where existence hums between what is and what could be. The convergence cannot last long—if sustained, it would tear the world into incoherent frequency.

skills.name: Attribute Boosters
skills.definition: Attribute Boosters are special abilities that mark a single attribute a character can temporarily enhance through an active roll-over check. The player writes the chosen attribute after “Attribute Booster” (e.g., “Attribute Booster – Strength”). On a successful roll, the attribute increases by half the points allocated to this ability for 2 minutes or 1 combat step per success rolled. Example: 20 points in a Strength booster with a roll of 90% and 2 successes grants +10 Strength for the duration. Higher investments allow boosting multiple attributes at once following the scaling chart.

skills.name: Berserker Rage
skills.definition: Berserker Rage is a powerful combat ability that greatly enhances a character’s Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution, but carries the risk of losing control. Upon activation, these attributes increase by half the points allocated in this ability for 3 minutes or 2 combat steps per success rolled. The user must make a control roll; high success extends duration and keeps attacks focused, while failure results in indiscriminate attacks against all creatures in sight. Example: A roll of 75 against a needed 20 maintains controlled rage for an extended time; a roll of 55 may cause uncontrolled assault for several rounds. Berserker Rage is a high-risk, high-reward ability that can turn the tide of battle but may also endanger allies.

skills.name: Shape Shifting
skills.definition: Shape Shifting allows a character to alter aspects of their physical form temporarily, from minor cosmetic changes to full body transformations. Possible alterations include turning body parts into weapons, changing appearance, or taking on entirely different forms. At 0–10% skill, only minor changes like elongating hair or hardening fingernails are possible; higher skill increases complexity and control. A failed roll may trap the character in their altered form until a successful reversion roll is made. G.O.D and player should agree on limits based on campaign setting—some worlds may allow limitless transformations, others only cosmetic shifts. This ability is highly versatile for problem-solving, infiltration, and creative combat tactics.

skills.name: Wild Talents
skills.definition: Wild Talents are special abilities that mark a single innate magical, psionic, or bardic resonance effect chosen by the player at character creation or advancement. The player writes the specific effect after “Wild Talent” (e.g., “Wild Talent – Fire”). On a successful roll-over check, the user may manifest effects from the chosen sphere, discipline, or resonance without learning the full path. Points in this ability are multiplied by a set factor to determine the effective mana rating for that effect. For example, 10 points with a ×3 multiplier provides an effective 30 mana rating. Failure consequences are set by the G.O.D. and may range from minor mishaps to severe backfires.

skills.name: Super Powers
skills.definition: Super Powers are special abilities that mark a single extraordinary non-magical ability chosen by the player at character creation or advancement. The player writes the specific ability after “Super Power” (e.g., “Super Power – Laser Eyes”). Each Super Power functions as an active-use roll-over check, with potency scaling to points invested. Common examples include elemental projection, enhanced senses, or physical feats beyond normal limits. To maintain balance, each Super Power has defined limits, weaknesses, or environmental conditions for use, set in agreement between the player and the G.O.D. On success, the chosen power functions at its current scaling; on failure, no effect occurs and the attempt may incur a minor drawback.

skills.name: Telepathic Bond
skills.definition: Telepathic Bond allows a user to create mental links with other beings to share thoughts, emotions, and sensory experiences. At 10% skill, the bond is with one target within 10 ft, sharing basic thoughts/emotions. At 25%, range is 25 ft and complex ideas can be conveyed. At 50%, multiple targets can be bonded, max number based on points invested, with a 50 ft range. At 75%, sensory sharing is possible and range extends to 100 ft. At 100%, unlimited targets can be bonded within 500 ft, and sensory experiences can be swapped between bonded individuals. A failed roll can cause harmful feedback loops (all targets overwhelmed by emotions/sensory input) or inability to disconnect, risking exposure of private thoughts. This ability is powerful for coordination, espionage, and deep character connections but carries risks that keep it balanced.

skills.name: Shadow Manipulation
skills.definition: Shadow Manipulation allows the user to control and shape shadows for concealment, illusions, or creating tangible constructs from darkness. At 10%, the user can manipulate existing shadows within 10 ft for minor illusions or concealment. At 25%, range extends to 25 ft and small shadow constructs (weapons, tools) become possible. At 50%, range is 50 ft with larger constructs, powerful illusions, and the ability to blind or restrain a target in shadows. At 75%, range increases to 100 ft, shadow duplicates and short-range teleportation via shadows become possible. At 100%, range expands to 500 ft with the creation of powerful shadow creatures, large constructs, and wide-area darkness. Limitations include vulnerability to bright light, which weakens or disrupts control. A failed roll can result in loss of control, revealing the user's position, creating hazardous constructs, or causing unpredictable shadow behavior.

skills.name: Energy Channeling
skills.definition: Energy Channeling allows the user to manipulate one or more forms of energy (kinetic, thermal, electrical, magical, etc.) for offense, defense, or utility. At 10%, they can channel one energy type for minor effects (sparks, small temp changes, minor strength boosts). At 25%, they can channel two energy types and generate more potent effects (small electrical shocks, energy barriers, stronger physical boosts). At 50%, they can channel three energy types, create energy blasts, absorb/redirect attacks, or heal minor wounds. At 75%, they can channel four energy types, manifest energy constructs, shield allies, or manipulate energy within objects/creatures. At 100%, they can channel five energy types with vast control, including transforming into pure energy, controlling area-wide flows, or altering fundamental energy properties. Risks include energy overload, loss of control, backlashes, or injuries. Vulnerable to enemies who can nullify or counteract energy.

skills.name: Gravity Manipulation
skills.definition: Gravity Manipulation gives the user control over gravitational forces. At 10%, they can subtly alter the weight of small objects to make them easier or harder to move. At 25%, they can affect larger objects or people, making them float or feel heavy. At 50%, they can create localized zones of altered gravity to hinder or aid movement/combat. At 75%, they can walk on walls/ceilings or briefly fly by manipulating gravitational pull. At 100%, they can create intense gravitational fields capable of crushing or repelling targets and objects. Effectiveness may vary in unusual gravity environments (space, other planets), where the G.O.D may require higher roll success or add restrictions.

skills.name: Spell Weaving
skills.definition: Spell Weaving allows a trained caster to merge multiple effects from a single system (Magic, Psionics, or Bardic Resonance) into a single casting. The effects must all be from spheres, disciplines, or resonances in which the caster is trained. Points invested in this ability determine how many effects can be woven at once. This ability is purchased separately for each system. Magic weaving combines magical spheres; psionic weaving combines psionic disciplines; bardic weaving combines bardic resonances. Failed weaving attempts may cause severe backlash or unintended combined effects at the G.O.D.’s discretion.

skills.name: Adrenaline Surge
skills.definition: Adrenaline Surge taps into the body’s primal survival mechanisms, flooding the user’s system with a rush of energy, heightened awareness, and raw power. In the moments it’s active, every heartbeat feels like a drumbeat of war—reflexes sharpen, movement speeds up, and strikes hit harder. The rush comes at a cost: once the effect ends, fatigue sets in, forcing the body to recover from the sudden expenditure of resources. At higher mastery, the surge lasts longer, hits harder, and becomes easier to control, allowing the user to push themselves to incredible feats without collapsing afterward.

skills.name: Arcane Ward
skills.definition: Arcane Ward manifests as a shimmering barrier of magical force that wraps around the user or their allies, absorbing incoming damage before it can reach flesh or armor. The ward can block both physical and magical attacks, its strength and durability scaling with the user’s mastery. While active, it glows faintly, deflecting blows and dispersing spells into harmless sparks. At greater mastery, the barrier becomes capable of reflecting a portion of the damage back to attackers, turning defense into offense.

skills.name: Battlefield Intuition
skills.definition: Battlefield Intuition grants the user an almost supernatural sense of the ebb and flow of combat, allowing them to anticipate enemy moves and adjust tactics before a blow is even thrown. This heightened awareness lets them dodge attacks more effectively and predict patterns in their opponents’ behavior. At higher mastery, this ability can feel like glimpsing the future, letting the user position themselves with surgical precision in any fight.

skills.name: Elemental Affinity
skills.definition: Elemental Affinity forges a deep bond between the user and a single chosen element—fire, frost, acid, lightning, or another force of nature. This affinity enhances all abilities tied to that element, increasing their damage and resistance to it. Over time, the user becomes so in tune with the element that they can shrug off lesser harmful effects entirely. Mastery represents near-complete symbiosis with the element, making the user a living embodiment of its power.

skills.name: Feral Instinct
skills.definition: Feral Instinct awakens the primal senses buried deep within the user’s mind, enhancing smell, hearing, and sight to near-animal levels. The user can track prey through scent trails, hear the quietest movements, and see in near darkness. As mastery increases, they can map an entire area through their senses alone, gaining unparalleled awareness of threats. At full mastery, these senses become so sharp they can resist sensory overload from blinding light or deafening noise.

skills.name: Kinetic Burst
skills.definition: Kinetic Burst unleashes a concentrated wave of physical or magical kinetic energy in a single explosive strike. The force radiates outward, dealing heavy damage and knocking enemies back. At higher levels, the radius and strength of the burst grow, staggering multiple foes at once and controlling the flow of battle. At its peak, Kinetic Burst becomes a devastating tool for clearing space and breaking enemy formations.

skills.name: Phase Step
skills.definition: Phase Step allows the user to briefly step out of the physical plane, becoming intangible and able to pass through solid objects or avoid attacks entirely. With greater mastery, the user can move farther, phase through thicker barriers, and even teleport short distances. At the highest level, this technique enables extended phasing and multiple rapid teleports within the same engagement.

skills.name: Psychic Shield
skills.definition: Psychic Shield projects a mental barrier around the user’s mind, blocking intrusive thoughts, telepathic surveillance, fear effects, and attempts at mind control. As the shield strengthens with mastery, it can repel increasingly powerful psychic assaults. At full power, the mind is entirely closed to unwanted influence, granting the user absolute sovereignty over their own thoughts and emotions.

skills.name: Time Dilation
skills.definition: Time Dilation manipulates the user’s perception of time, making the outside world seem to slow while their own movements remain at normal speed. At low mastery, this grants quicker reaction times and faster strikes. At higher levels, it approaches the realm of “bullet time,” allowing the user to act while opponents appear frozen. At its peak, the user can operate for precious seconds in completely frozen moments, moving and acting while all else is still.

skills.name: Weapon Bond
skills.definition: Weapon Bond forges an unbreakable connection between the user and a chosen weapon. The bond enhances accuracy, allows the weapon to be recalled instantly if disarmed, and eventually enables it to be imbued with magical or elemental effects. At maximum mastery, the user and weapon move as one—every strike perfectly timed, every defense instinctive.

skills.name: Combat Casting
skills.definition: Combat Casting is the refined art of channeling and releasing magical power in the heat of battle without sacrificing speed or accuracy. It allows the caster to weave spells seamlessly into melee or ranged engagements, reducing the penalties normally suffered when casting under pressure or while threatened. As mastery improves, the caster gains the ability to maintain concentration under duress, cast while moving, and even counter enemy attacks with instantaneous spells. At the highest levels, the user can unleash magic as fluidly as swinging a blade, making them a relentless threat in close quarters or chaotic combat situations.

skills.name: Blood Frenzy
skills.definition: Blood Frenzy is a savage combat state triggered when the user draws or suffers blood in battle. Once activated, the user’s strength, speed, and ferocity spike dramatically, but their self-control diminishes. The more damage dealt or taken, the deeper the frenzy becomes, making attacks faster and more brutal at the cost of defensive precision. At high mastery, the user can channel the frenzy without losing control, becoming a relentless predator on the battlefield.

skills.name: Iron Will
skills.definition: Iron Will is the mental fortitude to resist fear, intimidation, and coercion in all forms. Whether under magical compulsion, psychological warfare, or raw intimidation, the user’s resolve holds firm. At higher mastery, they can shrug off effects that would break lesser minds, and at full mastery, they become nearly unshakable.

skills.name: Weapon Mastery
skills.definition: Weapon Mastery represents unparalleled skill and precision with a chosen type of weapon—swords, bows, axes, etc. Each level increases attack accuracy, damage, and access to special maneuvers. At the highest level, the weapon feels like an extension of the user’s own body.

skills.name: Shadow Step
skills.definition: Shadow Step is the art of slipping into the darkness to instantly reappear from another shadow within range. It blends stealth, speed, and misdirection, making it ideal for ambushes and escapes. At higher mastery, the user can step farther, more often, and even attack while transitioning.

skills.name: Aura of Defiance
skills.definition: Aura of Defiance radiates unshakable resolve, bolstering the morale and courage of allies while instilling doubt in foes. Within its range, allies resist fear and gain improved defense, while enemies suffer hesitation and reduced combat efficiency. The aura strengthens with skill, eventually creating a zone where allies fight with unbreakable spirit and enemies feel compelled to retreat.

skills.name: Runic Empowerment
skills.definition: Runic Empowerment grants the ability to inscribe glowing runes of power onto weapons, armor, or surfaces, infusing them with magical enhancements. Runes can grant boosts such as elemental damage, protection, or utility effects. At low mastery, runes are temporary and weak; at high mastery, they become longer-lasting, more potent, and capable of holding multiple effects. At full mastery, the runes are permanent until dispelled and can shape the flow of battle.

skills.name: Spell Echo
skills.definition: Spell Echo allows the caster to instantly recast the last spell they successfully cast without repeating the full casting process. At low mastery, the echo is weaker and costs extra mana; at high mastery, it is equally strong and costs less. At full mastery, the echo can be cast for free once per combat.

skills.name: Blood Pact
skills.definition: Blood Pact allows the user to bind their vitality to fuel power, sacrificing health to enhance abilities or magic. At low mastery, small health sacrifices yield moderate boosts; at high mastery, larger boosts are possible with reduced risk. At full mastery, the pact can briefly grant overwhelming power at near-death cost.

skills.name: Tactical Reload
skills.definition: Tactical Reload grants the user extreme efficiency when reloading weapons or resetting combat tools. At low mastery, reloads are slightly faster; at high mastery, they are instant and can include weapon swaps. At full mastery, reloading can occur mid-action without breaking flow.

skills.name: Illusion Weaving
skills.definition: Illusion Weaving lets the user create and control complex illusions. At low mastery, illusions are simple and static; at high mastery, they are multi-sensory, interactive, and can cover large areas. At full mastery, illusions can fully deceive even magical senses until directly contradicted.

skills.name: Blade Dance
skills.definition: Blade Dance is a fluid combat style focusing on rapid movement and precise strikes. The user becomes a blur, delivering multiple attacks while evading counters. At low mastery, movement is quicker; at high mastery, attacks chain flawlessly with dodges. At full mastery, the user becomes nearly untouchable while striking multiple foes.

skills.name: Mana Surge
skills.definition: Mana Surge allows the user to temporarily draw deeply from their internal or ambient mana reserves, greatly amplifying the potency of their spells. This surge is dangerous if uncontrolled, as the sudden influx can destabilize magical channels and cause backlash. At lower mastery, the boost is brief and taxing, leaving the caster fatigued; at higher mastery, the surge lasts longer, costs less, and can be precisely timed to unleash devastating spells. At full mastery, the caster can channel immense magical force without suffering exhaustion.

skills.name: Guardian’s Stance
skills.definition: Guardian’s Stance transforms the user into an unyielding bulwark, improving their ability to block, parry, and resist knockback while also protecting nearby allies. At low mastery, it is simply a firmer defensive posture; at higher mastery, the stance can deflect heavy blows and shield multiple allies from harm. At full mastery, the guardian becomes nearly immovable, holding ground against overwhelming force.

skills.name: Vital Strike
skills.definition: Vital Strike is the art of striking precisely at an opponent’s weak points to maximize damage. At lower mastery, accuracy improves against exposed targets; at higher mastery, strikes are more likely to land critical hits and bypass armor. At full mastery, the user can pierce even heavily reinforced defenses with deadly efficiency.

skills.name: Battle Trance
skills.definition: Battle Trance is a focused mental state in which the user perceives combat with perfect clarity, anticipating threats before they strike. At low mastery, reaction speed and awareness improve; at higher mastery, the user can respond before an enemy fully commits to an attack. At full mastery, the user’s movements flow instinctively, chaining offense and defense seamlessly.

skills.name: Arcane Overload
skills.definition: Arcane Overload allows the caster to intentionally push their magical channels beyond safe limits, unleashing raw, unstable energy for overwhelming power. At lower mastery, the overload is brief and often leaves the caster drained; at higher mastery, the duration, control, and destructive potential increase. At full mastery, the caster can maintain an overload long enough to change the outcome of an entire battle, though the risk of catastrophic magical backlash remains.

skills.name: Spirit Bond
skills.definition: Spirit Bond forges a deep link between the user and a chosen spirit, familiar, or bonded creature, allowing them to share strength, senses, and even magical effects. At lower mastery, the bond is limited to emotional and sensory connection; at higher mastery, shared abilities and mutual empowerment become possible. At full mastery, the bond is seamless, allowing the two to fight, sense, and act as one.

skills.name: Battle Cry
skills.definition: Battle Cry channels raw emotion into a rallying shout that bolsters allies and intimidates foes. At lower mastery, it grants a minor morale boost; at higher mastery, it can break enemy resolve and strengthen allied combat prowess. At full mastery, a single cry can turn the tide of battle.

skills.name: Mind Pierce
skills.definition: Mind Pierce focuses psionic or magical energy into a direct mental attack, disrupting thoughts, breaking concentration, or damaging the mind itself. At lower mastery, it causes mild disorientation; at higher mastery, it can cause confusion, fear, or even unconsciousness. At full mastery, it can shatter a target’s mental defenses entirely.

skills.name: Earthshatter
skills.definition: Earthshatter channels immense force into the ground, creating a localized seismic shockwave. At lower mastery, it knocks enemies off balance; at higher mastery, it can damage structures and send foes sprawling. At full mastery, the impact can cause devastating battlefield-wide tremors.

skills.name: Soul Rend
skills.definition: Soul Rend is a devastating ability that targets the very essence of a being, bypassing physical armor to inflict direct harm on their soul or life force. At low mastery, it causes discomfort and minor spiritual disruption; at higher mastery, it can weaken vitality, sever magical bonds, and even cause lasting spiritual injury. At full mastery, Soul Rend can cripple an opponent’s spirit entirely, leaving them powerless.

skills.name: Wind Walk
skills.definition: Wind Walk transforms the user’s movement into swift, near-silent gliding on air currents. At lower mastery, it grants speed boosts; at higher mastery, it allows brief levitation and mid-air direction changes. At full mastery, Wind Walk enables rapid, evasive movement and near-flight capabilities.

skills.name: Mana Burn
skills.definition: Mana Burn channels volatile anti-magic into a target, draining their magical reserves and converting part of it into damage. At low mastery, it burns small amounts of mana; at higher mastery, it devastates magical resources and causes physical harm. At full mastery, Mana Burn can cripple a caster entirely.

skills.name: Mirror Strike
skills.definition: Mirror Strike is a deceptive combat technique that allows the user to instantly replicate an opponent’s attack and return it with equal or greater force. At low mastery, it can mimic only basic melee strikes; at higher mastery, it can copy complex techniques, ranged attacks, and even certain magical effects. At full mastery, Mirror Strike reflects attacks almost perfectly, turning an enemy’s power against them in real time.

skills.name: Spirit Chain
skills.definition: Spirit Chain binds the user’s essence to another creature, allowing them to share damage, senses, or even abilities for a limited duration. At low mastery, only basic sense-sharing is possible; at higher mastery, pain, health, and magical effects can be linked. At full mastery, the bond is seamless and can be used tactically for both protection and coordination.

skills.name: Void Step
skills.definition: Void Step shifts the user partially into a void dimension, allowing them to vanish from the material plane for a moment and reappear elsewhere. At low mastery, this allows quick dodges; at higher mastery, longer shifts through void space are possible, bypassing barriers entirely. At full mastery, Void Step can be used to reappear at extreme distances or even behind dimensional seals.

skills.name: Celestial Beacon
skills.definition: Celestial Beacon summons a radiant pillar of light imbued with divine energy, bolstering allies and burning foes. At low mastery, it heals minor wounds or causes light damage to undead; at higher mastery, it greatly boosts morale, heals large areas, and smites enemies with divine power. At full mastery, the beacon’s presence can shift the course of battle entirely.

skills.name: Runic Overload
skills.definition: Runic Overload forces a magical rune or glyph to release all stored power at once, causing a massive but unstable effect. At low mastery, the overload creates a small shockwave; at higher mastery, it can destroy magical constructs, shatter wards, or create area devastation. At full mastery, Runic Overload can rupture even ancient wards or catastrophically disrupt battlefield magic.

skills.name: Blood Oath
skills.definition: Blood Oath is a binding pact sealed in the life essence of two or more beings. Once made, the oath enforces promises with supernatural compulsion, rewarding loyalty and punishing betrayal. At lower mastery, the effects are symbolic; at higher mastery, breaking the oath inflicts severe physical, magical, or spiritual damage. At full mastery, the Blood Oath becomes nearly impossible to break without death or powerful ritual.

skills.name: Seismic Slam
skills.definition: Seismic Slam channels force into the ground, creating shockwaves that knock down, injure, or disrupt enemies. At low mastery, it causes a small tremor; at higher mastery, it can throw opponents into the air, break formations, or collapse structures. At full mastery, it can shatter terrain, open fissures, and devastate large battlefields.

skills.name: Hunter’s Mark
skills.definition: Hunter’s Mark is a tracking enchantment or instinctive focus that locks the user onto a target. At low mastery, it marks for short-term pursuit; at higher mastery, the mark persists across terrain, barriers, and magical concealment. At full mastery, the user always knows the target’s location, direction, and condition until death.

skills.name: Stormcaller
skills.definition: Stormcaller allows the user to summon and control localized weather phenomena, starting with light wind or rain and advancing to full-scale storms. At low mastery, it can create minor cover or discomfort; at higher mastery, it can disrupt visibility, hinder movement, and deal elemental damage. At full mastery, it can command massive lightning strikes, torrential rains, and hurricane-level winds over wide areas.

skills.name: Harbinger Elf Berserker Rage
skills.definition: Harbinger Elf Berserker Rage is a unique fury channeled exclusively against undead creatures and necromantic forces. This rage cannot be used against living beings and is fueled by an innate connection to life. At 10%, the Elf gains a 10% bonus to all actions against undead and develops Undead Sensitivity, sensing nearby undead. At 25%, bonus increases to 25%, and hidden or obscured undead can be detected. At 50%, bonus rises to 50%, and undead locations can be pinpointed with instinctual accuracy. At 75%, bonus reaches 75%, sensing undead over great distances. At 100%, bonus is 100%, and undead can be detected with perfect clarity regardless of obstacles or distance. Bright light, holy wards, or anti-undead magic may not interfere with sensing but can still reduce combat efficiency. The rage remains a focused, devastating weapon against undeath, making Harbinger Elves unmatched undead hunters.

skills.name: Blood Legacy
skills.definition: Blood Legacy is the born vampire’s unique ability to absorb the memories, skills, and experiences of those they feed upon, bypassing the need for conventional training. At its earliest level, this manifests as the retention of basic memories and simple skills, granting rudimentary proficiency without formal practice. With increased mastery, more complex skills and intermediate abilities can be taken directly from the victim’s mind, and feeding on another vampire transfers up to a quarter of their skill level. At advanced levels, even refined, high-level knowledge can be integrated seamlessly, allowing the vampire to perform with the ease of a seasoned practitioner. Near mastery, the vampire can pull not only skills but personal insight, creativity, and tactical experience, making them an unpredictable and dangerous foe. At the highest tier, the vampire becomes a living archive of countless lives, drawing on a vast pool of abilities and perspectives, though at the cost of carrying the echoes of those consumed.

skills.name: Vampiric Charm
skills.definition: Vampiric Charm is an innate ability of born vampires, functioning like the Sphere of Charm and allowing the vampire to attempt any spell or ability from that sphere. At 10%, they can attempt basic charm spells and influence weak-willed targets; failure results in the vampire being charmed by the target. At 25%, stronger-willed individuals can be influenced, with increased charm effectiveness but the same reversal risk. At 50%, charm can affect groups and more complex spells; presence becomes nearly irresistible. At 75%, even the most strong-willed can be charmed, with precise multi-target manipulation. At 100%, the vampire can charm with maximum effectiveness, even against the most resistant minds, though reversal remains possible. The ability embodies a balance of great influence and dangerous vulnerability.

skills.name: Vampiric Forms
skills.definition: Vampiric Forms allows a vampire to transform into various forms as mastery increases. At 10%, they can shift into Bat Form for mobility and stealth. At 25%, Mist Form is unlocked, allowing vaporous escape and movement through small spaces. At 50%, they gain an Animal Form of choice, providing versatility for combat or stealth. At 75%, the vampire can fly in humanoid form, granting unmatched aerial mobility. At 100%, they unlock Terrifying Aura: a fear effect lasting 15 minutes or 2 combat steps per success, in a radius of 10 ft per success; those affected must beat the vampire’s roll with a Wisdom check to resist. Each form grants unique advantages for combat, exploration, and psychological warfare.

skills.name: Direct Casting
skills.definition: Direct Casting allows a spellcaster to cast any spell, including raw magic, without spending mana — one spell per success rolled. On failure, the caster’s mana drops to 0. At 100% mastery, failure is only possible on a roll of 001. This makes it a high-risk, high-reward ability that, when mastered, changes the nature of magical combat and resource management.

skills.name: Purification/Corruption
skills.definition: Purification/Corruption allows the user to influence sentient beings or substances over an area of 10 ft per success rolled. Effects are permanent unless undone. Can be used to purify or corrupt — e.g., cleanse poisoned water or taint it. Fearai characters have wings that visually reflect their moral path when using this power. Creative use is encouraged, with potential large-scale impact.

skills.name: Shift Forms
skills.definition: The Shift Forms ability grants the character the power to transform between multiple distinct forms. At 10%, they begin with an animal form and a humanoid form, providing the foundation of their shapeshifting power. At 50%, they unlock a third transformation. At 75%, they gain their ultimate form. In the second and third forms, natural attacks such as claws (3 damage) and bites (4 damage) gain a Strength bonus. This ability offers diverse tactical options and rich role-playing potential as the character adapts forms to overcome different challenges.

skills.name: Natural Camouflage
