skills.definition: Natural Camouflage allows the character to blend seamlessly into their surroundings, progressively enhancing stealth. At 10%, they gain subtle concealment; at 25%, they blend naturally with most environments; at 50%, they move almost undetected across varied terrain; at 75%, they achieve near-invisibility; and at 100%, they become virtually undetectable in any setting. This skill provides significant advantages in ambushes, reconnaissance, or evasion, and is valuable in both combat and non-combat scenarios.

skills.name: Sense Undead
skills.definition: Sense Undead grants the character the ability to detect undead presence. At 10%, they sense undead vaguely within 30 ft; at 25%, within 60 ft with rough quantity info; at 50%, within 100 ft with type and strength tier; at 75%, within 150 ft with exact location and control source; and at 100%, within 300 ft with full details, including faint traces of undeath. This ability is invaluable in undead-heavy environments for anticipating threats and gaining tactical advantages.

skills.name: Dark Vision
skills.definition: Dark Vision grants the character the ability to see in low-light or total darkness without relying on natural light sources. Its range and clarity improve with mastery, making it invaluable for underground exploration, nocturnal missions, or dark environments. At 10% they see clearly in dim light, at 25% they perceive shapes in darkness, at 50% they see in darkness as twilight, at 75% they see clearly in total darkness up to 60 ft, and at 100% they see in total darkness as daylight up to 120 ft, unaffected by magical darkness.

skills.name: Magic Immunity
skills.definition: Magic Immunity provides progressive resistance to hostile magic, culminating in total immunity at mastery. At 10% the character reduces harmful magic effects by 10%; at 25% by 25%; at 50% by 50%; at 75% they are immune to weaker spells and take only 25% damage from strong ones; at 100% they are immune to all hostile magic. This rare defensive ability is invaluable against spellcasters and magical creatures.

skills.name: Hovering
skills.definition: Hovering allows the character to suspend themselves in the air without wings or devices, improving in duration, height, and maneuverability with mastery. At 10% they hover inches above ground for 30s; at 25% they hover 1 ft for 1 min with slight maneuvering; at 50% they hover 3 ft for minutes with moderate speed; at 75% they hover indefinitely up to 10 ft with high agility; at 100% they hover up to 30 ft with precision control and great speed.

skills.name: Water Breathing
skills.definition: Water Breathing enables the character to breathe underwater, improving in duration, comfort, and adaptability with mastery. At 10% they can breathe underwater for 10 min; at 25% for 30 min with efficient swimming; at 50% for 1 hr with deep diving capability; at 75% indefinitely with enhanced swim speed; at 100% fully adapted to underwater life, immune to pressure/depth effects, and equally at home in fresh or saltwater.

skills.name: Flight
skills.definition: Flight grants the character the ability to fly, providing unmatched mobility and tactical advantages. Progression increases distance, control, speed, altitude, and carrying capacity. At 10% they can fly 100 ft with limited control; at 25% they fly 500 ft with better maneuverability and light carrying; at 50% they fly for miles at high speed with advanced maneuvers and heavy loads; at 75% they fly indefinitely at great speeds with full aerial combat capabilities; at 100% they have complete mastery, limitless altitude, extreme speed, unmatched agility, and full load capacity.

skills.name: Natural Leader
skills.definition: Leadership allows a character to inspire, rally, and guide others, enhancing morale, coordination, and combat performance. At 10% they inspire small groups within 10 ft with minor morale boosts; at 25% they inspire larger groups within 30 ft and issue basic commands; at 50% they rally squads within 60 ft with major morale boosts and strong coordination; at 75% they command battalions within 100 ft, granting large morale boosts, stamina, and resistance to fear/confusion; at 100% they command armies or factions within 300 ft, inspiring near-total loyalty and resistance to most psychological/magical effects.

skills.name: Poison Immunity
skills.definition: Poison Immunity progressively shields the character from toxins, venoms, and poisonous environments. At 10% they resist weak poisons (10% effect reduction); at 25% they resist moderate poisons (25% reduction); at 50% they resist a wide range of deadly toxins (50% reduction); at 75% they are immune to most poisons, only rare/magical toxins affect them (75% reduction); at 100% they are immune to all natural and magical poisons.

skills.name: Charm Ability
skills.definition: Charm Ability enables the character to influence emotions, thoughts, and actions through charisma or magic. At 10% they charm one target briefly for friendliness; at 25% they charm two targets longer, persuading minor favors; at 50% they charm up to five targets for hours with moderate influence; at 75% they charm up to ten targets or resistant individuals for a day, willing to follow significant requests; at 100% they charm entire crowds or strong-willed targets for days, capable of overriding loyalties.

skills.name: Keen Hearing
skills.definition: Keen Hearing sharpens the auditory senses beyond natural limits, enabling the user to detect sounds most would never notice. At its earliest stages, this means catching faint noises at modest distances, like a twig snapping or the creak of a door hinge. As mastery develops, the user can distinguish individual sounds even in crowded or noisy environments, isolating a single voice or footstep from a chaotic soundscape. At higher levels, the sense penetrates through light barriers such as thin walls or foliage, granting an edge in both exploration and combat. True masters can identify the source and nature of a sound with pinpoint accuracy over vast distances, detecting even a racing heartbeat or the whisper of movement hundreds of feet away.

skills.name: Keen Sense of Smell
skills.definition: Keen Sense of Smell grants an extraordinary olfactory range, allowing the user to perceive, separate, and interpret scents with remarkable precision. Initially, this manifests as detecting strong or distinctive odors within close proximity, useful for basic tracking or environmental awareness. With training, the user can differentiate and follow multiple scent trails simultaneously, even in complex environments. At advanced levels, faint or masked scents become clear, enabling accurate pursuit of targets and detection of hidden dangers. At its peak, the sense extends over great distances, cutting through barriers and revealing detailed chemical or biological information about the source, making it invaluable for hunters, trackers, and scouts.

skills.name: Keen Eyesight
skills.definition: Keen Eyesight heightens visual acuity to superhuman levels, enabling detection of fine details and subtle movements far beyond normal range. At low mastery, the user enjoys sharper vision and clarity over medium distances, spotting things others would miss. Progression brings the ability to track minute motion and identify hidden threats such as traps or concealed objects. Higher levels enhance performance in low-light conditions, allowing precision even in dim environments. At maximum mastery, the user perceives with perfect clarity over extreme distances in any lighting, making them virtually immune to visual deception.

skills.name: Vampiric Magical Immunities
skills.definition: Vampiric Magical Immunities offer a supernatural resilience to most forms of magic, honed by an innate predatory resistance to arcane forces. At low mastery, this grants a modest resistance to harmful magical effects, though vulnerabilities to Life and Fire magic remain extreme. As mastery increases, the user shrugs off a greater proportion of magical assaults, deflecting enchantments, curses, and elemental attacks alike. High mastery renders all but the most potent magic nearly harmless, forcing even powerful mages to rely on the user’s weaknesses to inflict harm. At peak performance, the user approaches complete immunity to every magical discipline except Life and Fire—against which they remain dangerously susceptible.

skills.name: Dragon Fire
skills.definition: Dragon Fire channels the primal destructive force of flame into a breath weapon of increasing potency and control. At lower levels, the user can exhale short bursts of searing heat capable of scorching foes and igniting flammable surfaces. With practice, the flames intensify, spreading over wider areas and delivering sustained burning damage. Advanced mastery allows the wielder to manipulate the breadth and shape of their flame, creating walls of fire or precision bursts. At its apex, Dragon Fire becomes an inferno that can engulf entire battlefields, overwhelming enemies and altering the environment itself with sheer heat and devastation.

skills.name: Dragon Acid
skills.definition: Dragon Acid manifests as a highly corrosive breath weapon, dissolving organic and inorganic material alike. At early stages, it can inflict painful burns and light damage, but its true danger lies in the lingering effect that continues to erode armor, weapons, and flesh over time. With increased skill, the acid grows stronger and lasts longer, able to eat through hardened steel or stone. Expert practitioners can target specific weak points, rendering even the most durable defenses useless. At full mastery, the acid becomes a battlefield hazard in its own right, leaving lasting damage to terrain, structures, and any foe unfortunate enough to be caught in its path.

skills.name: Dragon Spark
skills.definition: Dragon Spark unleashes lightning in concentrated bursts or branching arcs, capable of chaining between multiple targets. Initially, it delivers a quick jolt—enough to stun and cause moderate harm. As skill improves, the electrical discharge grows in intensity and reach, finding new targets through conductive materials like metal armor or wet surfaces. Mastery enables fine control, allowing the wielder to strike individual foes with surgical precision or spread damage across a cluster of enemies. At its highest level, Dragon Spark can black out entire areas, overload equipment, and render heavily armored units helpless before the raw power of the storm.

skills.name: Dragon Frost
skills.definition: Dragon Frost breathes forth a chilling wind capable of slowing, freezing, and immobilizing targets. Beginners can coat foes in ice and reduce mobility, making them easier to strike or evade. With practice, the frost grows more intense, spreading across wider areas and freezing surfaces solid. At advanced stages, the wielder can trap multiple targets in ice simultaneously, controlling the flow of battle through terrain manipulation. At peak strength, Dragon Frost can encase entire groups or structures in solid ice, halting movement entirely and reshaping the battlefield into a frozen domain.

skills.name: Dragon Sleep
skills.definition: Dragon Sleep is a mystical exhalation that bypasses armor and physical defenses, sending foes into a deep, magical slumber. At the most basic level, it affects a single target for a short duration. With greater control, the effect can spread to multiple targets, each falling into a longer and harder-to-resist sleep. Mastery allows the wielder to suppress wakefulness entirely in an area, creating moments of tactical dominance without inflicting physical harm. At full power, Dragon Sleep can incapacitate entire squads, forcing enemies into helplessness for extended periods and leaving them vulnerable to capture or strategic repositioning.

skills.name: Elemental Dragon Breath
skills.definition: Elemental Dragon Breath allows the user to weave multiple elemental forces—fire, acid, frost, lightning, and beyond—into a single devastating attack. Beginners channel a single element, tailoring their assault to the foe’s weaknesses. As mastery grows, multiple elements can be layered together, overwhelming defenses that rely on resistance to only one type of damage. High-level practitioners can dynamically shift elements mid-attack, adapting instantly to the flow of battle. At its ultimate level, Elemental Dragon Breath unleashes every elemental force at once in a catastrophic display, obliterating anything in its path.

skills.name: Full Sphere Access
skills.definition: Full Sphere Access unlocks the wielder’s ability to command magical spheres beyond the limits of their intellect or training. At low levels, this means learning an additional sphere and applying extra skill to spell rolls. With progression, more spheres become available, increasing magical versatility and strategic depth. Higher mastery reduces the mana cost of casting, allowing for more frequent or sustained spell use. At its height, Full Sphere Access grants complete control over every magical sphere and allows certain spells to be cast without expending mana at all, creating a nearly limitless reservoir of magical potential.

skills.name: Echolocation
skills.definition: Echolocation allows the user to navigate and perceive surroundings via sound wave emissions and echo interpretation, functioning even in complete darkness. At 10%, the user detects large objects and general surroundings to avoid obstacles. At 25%, they detect smaller objects and moving targets, improving awareness. At 50%, they identify materials or creature types in the vicinity. At 75%, they can pinpoint structural or anatomical weak points, gaining combat or strategic bonuses. At 100%, they can emit a focused sonic blast to damage or disorient enemies. Effectiveness decreases in noisy or sound-dampened environments, possibly requiring higher roll success or imposing penalties.

skills.name: Umbral Veil
skills.definition: Umbral Veil is the art of vanishing into absence itself—whether slipping between real shadows, cloaking within the static of a glitched datafeed, or bending perception so that the mind refuses to notice you. At lower mastery, it’s little more than enhanced stealth, but still enough to fade from casual sight or slip past inattentive guards. As skill deepens, the veil becomes an active shroud that distorts both light and digital signals, masking movement and presence even from advanced detection systems. Masters of the veil can walk through security checkpoints or across a battlefield unseen, using darkness and distortion as both shield and weapon. At its peak, Umbral Veil doesn’t simply hide you—it convinces the world you were never there to begin with.

skills.name: Glamour Shift
skills.definition: Glamour Shift is the disciplined fusion of illusion and physical modulation, allowing the user to alter their form as effortlessly as changing clothes. At its most basic, it smooths imperfections or tweaks small details—enough to bypass casual recognition. With training, these changes expand into complete masks: voice, gait, posture, and even the micro-expressions that betray impostors. True masters can assume a flawless likeness of another, fooling both human senses and sophisticated biometric scanners for extended periods. Whether for infiltration, performance, or survival, Glamour Shift turns identity into a fluid tool—letting its wielder become anyone, anywhere, at any time.

skills.name: Moonshadow Omen
skills.definition: Moonshadow Omen allows the Argent Sanguis to channel lunar resonance, weaving glimpses of possible futures directly into their actions. This foresight grows stronger with mastery, from momentary flashes to complete pre-battle awareness. At 10%, they can manipulate fate in small bursts, granting quick corrections to immediate mistakes. At 25%, they can enter a half-lucid trance to read surface thoughts and spot hidden ethereal dangers. At 50%, they extend their foresight as a protective veil to nearby allies, enhancing defense and evasion. At 75%, they can alter the flow of battle itself by forcing an enemy to change course mid-action. At 100%, they enter a state of perfect prophecy, acting before others can move and perceiving all within their reach with absolute clarity. Activation is at will; failure results in prophetic overload—stunned for 1 combat step and –10 to all rolls until scene end.
